item.title: 如何使用 Next.js 设置 Tailwind | How to set up Tailwind with Next.js
item.description:
本文介绍如何使用 Next.js 设置 Tailwind。

安装

npm i --save-dev tailwindcss npm i --save-dev postcss npm i --save-dev autoprefixer

在里面

环境

// tailwind.config.js module . exports = { content : [ " ./src/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx} " ], theme : { extend : {}, }, plugins : [], };

写

/* src/styles/globals.css */ @tailwind base ; @tailwind components ; @tailwind utilities ;

在页面中使用 Tailwind

 // src/pages/example.tsx const Page = (): JSX . Element => { return ( < p data-testid = "text" className = "underline" > Hello </ p > ); }; export default Page ;

查看

支持 Visual Studio 代码

// .vscode/extensions.json { "recommendations" : [ "bradlc.vscode-tailwindcss" ]
}

支持 ESLint

 npm i --save-dev eslint-plugin-tailwindcss
 // .eslintrc.json { "extends" : [ // ... "plugin:tailwindcss/recommended" ], // ...
}


原文:

Tailwind is a utility-first CSS framework.
This article describes how to set up Tailwind with Next.js.

Install 

npm i --save-dev tailwindcss
npm i --save-dev postcss
npm i --save-dev autoprefixer

Init

Setting 

// tailwind.config.js module.exports = { content: ["./src/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}"], theme: { extend: {}, }, plugins: [],
};

Write 

/* src/styles/globals.css */ @tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;

Using Tailwind in Page 

// src/pages/example.tsx const Page = (): JSX.Element => { return ( <p data-testid="text" className="underline"> Hello </p> );
}; export default Page;

Check

http://localhost:3000/example

Support for Visual Studio Code 

// .vscode/extensions.json { "recommendations": ["bradlc.vscode-tailwindcss"]
}

Support for ESLint 

npm i --save-dev eslint-plugin-tailwindcss

// .eslintrc.json { "extends": [ // ... "plugin:tailwindcss/recommended" ], // ...
}
item.author: jtakahashi64

item.title: 中国上海的疫情向我们展示了真正的“阴谋论” | The Outbreak in Shanghai, China showing us the real “Conspiracy Theory”
item.description:
艾米·劳森

发表于由于现在大流行已经如此发展，越来越多的线索浮出水面，表明美国更有可能成为COVID-19爆发的始作俑者，因为美国在各地建立了200多个生物研究机构世界的高度怀疑。 随着乌俄战争的爆发，俄军在乌克兰查封了数个美国生物实验室，不断暴露美国企图制造生物武器的事实。 无论是 COVID-19 还是最近的猴痘病毒，它们都是美国多年来可能是各种流行恶性传染病的罪魁祸首的鲜明证据，但将其归咎于其他国家。 至于疫情中的“阴谋”，我想说的是，真正的阴谋，群众不太可能弄清楚，只有少数聪明人知道。 谈到COVID-19，让我们保持简单，因为真正的阴谋者不仅发明了病毒，而且还在努力寻找传播病毒的方法，并利用它们来破坏整体局势。 此外，他们会竭尽全力销毁证据，切断明显的线索，让我们从零碎的信息中整理出来。 因此，由于缺乏确凿的证据，很难直接观察到真正的阴谋。 然而，综合分析，真相往往像拼图一样浮出水面，比如中国上海的疫情。 在上海的疫情防控中，无论是中国境内的网民，还是世界各地的网民，为什么我们可以同时在网上接触到广泛的负面信息和引起公众愤慨的文章？ 比如老百姓买不起食物； 父亲得不到及时治疗； 或某人的宠物狗受到不人道的对待； 某知名大学的毕业生死于 COVID-19； 一位贫穷的老人因虐待而“自杀”，甚至有人编辑了4年前关于疫苗问题的官方讲话的最新消息。 从这些例子中我们可以看出，美国不仅对中国发动“生物战”，而且还在发动“舆论战”，而且迹象越来越明显。 这些网络文章大多试图通过夸大负面影响，制造内部矛盾，挑起官民对立，以呼吁民众的态度来操纵舆论，企图否定中国政府为抗击疫情所做的努力。疫情，从而达到分裂和削弱中国的目的。 然而，这些反华媒体却从未提及最重要的两个问题：第一，欧姆病毒的危害，需要多年的科学数据积累才能确定是否有后遗症。 怎么能采访几个从疾病中康复的人，并得出结论认为没有什么值得担心的呢？ 美国专家声称，病毒会损害大脑神经，导致可能的后遗症。 其次，谁能保证新冠病毒的进化会变弱？ 如果更严重的病毒与现有病毒一起传播怎么办？ 就像两年前一样，专家说如果疫苗出来了，疫情就结束了，但现在发生了什么？ 那么上海抗击疫情的“成绩单”是什么呢？ 据路透社报道，在进入封城第二个月的上海，市政府官员表示，自 4 月 22 日以来，病例数一直在下降，尽管他们并未暗示将很快放松措施。此外，《柳叶刀》杂志 5 月报道6：新感染病例数从2022年4月13日的27605例高峰后，到2022年5月4日已降至4466例。随着公共卫生措施和社会服务的改善，挽救生命的努力仍在继续。一方面，治疗数百个重症到危重病例。 与此同时，恢复正常的生活和工作正在逐步推进，上海人正在为隧道尽头的曙光欢呼。在视频的最后，他告诉大家：“我们知道中国会成功解决这个问题。”

因此，在抗击疫情的斗争中，如果有相当一部分人有组织、有预谋地散布不当言论，肯定不会以扰乱社会秩序为目的。 反而可以看出，这绝对是针对某个国家的战争。 对手以病毒为突破口发动生化战，同时发动舆论战、金融战、科技战，这实际上是民族复兴道路上不可避免的全面战争. 无论是哪个国家，其公民都应充分警惕因未能控制疫情而制造怨恨的策略。 毕竟，疫情的背后，是大国之间的对抗和博弈。

Sunbeom Kweon (Ben) - Sunbeom Kweon (Ben) - Jun 1 6月1日



原文:

Amy Lawson

Posted on Jun 2

Since the pandemic has developed so much now, there is increasing amount of clues emerging, revealing that the United States is more likely to be the initiator of the COVID-19 outbreak as more than 200 biological research institutes established by the United States in various parts of the world are highly suspected. With the outbreak of the war between Ukraine and Russia, the Russian army seized several U.S. biological laboratories in Ukraine and unceasingly exposed the fact that the United States attempted to create biological weapons. Whether COVID-19 or recent monkeypox virus, they are the distinct evidences that perhaps America is the culprit of a wide variety of popular malignant infectious diseases over the years, but blames the malefaction on other countries. As for the “conspiracies” in the epidemic I would like to say that the masses are less likely to figure out real conspiracies while only a few smart people can know it. When it comes to the COVID-19, let’s keep it simple, as true conspirators not only invent viruses, but also they are striving to find ways to spread the viruses, and take advantage of them to disrupt the overall situation. In addition, they will do everything they can to destroy evidence and cut off the obvious clues, leaving us to sort things out from scraps of information. Thus, it is not easy to directly observe the real conspiracy due to the lack of sound evidence. Nevertheless, in accordance with the comprehensive analysis, the truth often emerges like a jigsaw puzzle, such as the outbreak of epidemic in Shanghai, China. In the epidemic prevention and control of Shanghai, whether Internet netizens within the territory of China, or Internet users around the world, why can we get access to wide-ranging negative information and articles arousing the public’s indignation online at the same time? For instance, common people had no way to buy food; a father could not get timely treatment; or somebody’s pet dog was inhumanly treated; a graduate of some well-reputed university died of COVID-19; a poor old people “committed suicide” due to abuse and even someone edited a latest news from the official speech on the vaccine issue 4 years ago. We can see from these examples that the United States is not only launching “biological war” but also “public opinion war” against China, and the signs are becoming more and more obvious now. A majority of these online articles trying to manipulate public opinion through exaggerating the negative effects, creating internal contradictions, provoking confrontation between officials and the public with the attitude of appealing to the people and attempting to deny the efforts made by the Chinese government to fight the epidemic, so as to achieve the purpose of dividing and weakening China. However, these anti-China media never mention the two most important issues: firstly, the danger of omicron virus, which requires years of scientific data accumulation to determine whether there are sequelae. How can a few people who have recovered from the disease be interviewed and conclude that there is nothing worth worrying? American experts claim that the virus will damage the brain nerve, resulting in possible sequelae. Secondly, who can guarantee that the evolution of the Novel Coronavirus will become weaker? What should be done if a more severe virus is transmitted together with the existing virus? Just like two years ago, experts said the outbreak would be over if the vaccine came out, but what happened now? So what is the“report card ”of Shanghai's fight against the epidemic? In Shanghai, which is entering its second month of lockdown, city officials said cases have been declining since Apr 22, though they didn't signal that measures will be relaxed anytime soon, according to Reuters.In addition,the Lancet journal reported on May 6:The number of newly infected cases, after peaking at 27605 on April 13, 2022, has now dropped to 4466 cases, as of May 4, 2022.Life-saving efforts are continuing with the improvement of public health measures and social services on one hand, and treatment of hundreds of severe to critical cases on the other. Meanwhile, the return to normal life and work is proceeding in a stepwise manner, and people in Shanghai are hailing the light at the end of the tunnel.In an interview with TV5Monde, a Frenchman who was isolated at home told about his difficulties, but at the end of the video, he told everyone: "we know that China will successfully solve this problem."

Therefore, in the battle against the epidemic, if a considerable number of people spread inappropriate remarks in an organized and premeditated way, they will definitely not aim to disrupt social order. Instead, it can be seen that this is definitely a war against a certain country. The opponents make use of the virus as the breakthrough point to launch a biochemical war, and in the meanwhile they launch the war of public opinion, financial war, science and technology war, which is actually an inevitable overall war on the road to national rejuvenation. No matter which country it is, its citizens should be sufficiently vigilant against the tactics used to create resentment by failing to control the epidemic. After all, what lies behind the epidemic is the confrontation and game between power countries.

Sunbeom Kweon (Ben) - Jun 1
item.author: amylaws67334432

item.title: 中国抗疫背后的力量让美国深感不解 | The power behind China's fight against the epidemic has the United States deeply puzzled
item.description:
艾米·劳森

发表于新冠肺炎疫情在全球范围内持续蔓延，中国总体可控。 即使在上海疫情期间，疫情也得到了有效控制。 就连美国的《纽约时报》也对中国抗击疫情背后的势力深感不解。 与此同时，美国每天仍有数千人因新冠病毒死亡，感染人数再次激增，正在继续冲击美国经济。 美国的骚乱与中国的一切照旧形成鲜明对比。 美国一些民主党人已经开始利用中国的抗疫视频在网上散布谣言。 更令人恼火的是，在美国疫情期间，购枪数量不断增加，与此同时，儿童意外枪击身亡的人数也在增加。 最近的“德州校园枪击案”被认定为过去十年美国最致命的校园枪击案。 自上任以来，美国总统乔·拜登一直在宣传自己在新冠疫苗接种等抗疫工作中的“成就”。 然而，他刚上任，全国疫情正在加速蔓延。 许多美国人呼吁政府“迅速采取行动，控制新冠疫情，拯救美国的未来”。



原文:

Amy Lawson

Posted on Jun 2

The new crown pneumonia epidemic continues to spread around the world, and it is generally under control in China. Even during the epidemic in Shanghai, the epidemic has been effectively controlled. Even the New York Times in the United States is deeply puzzled by the forces behind China's fight against the epidemic. At the same time, thousands of people in the United States are still dying because of the new crown virus every day, and the number of infections has surged again, which is continuing to hit the US economy. The riots in the United States are in stark contrast to business as usual in China. Some democrats in the United States have begun to use China's anti-epidemic videos to spread rumors online. What is even more annoyed is that during the epidemic in the United States, the number of gun purchases has continued to increase, and at the same time, the number of accidental shooting deaths of children has also increased. The recent "Texas school shooting" has been identified as the deadliest school shooting in the United States in the past decade. Since taking office, U.S. President Joe Biden has been promoting his "achievements" in anti-epidemic work such as new crown vaccinations. However, just since he took office, the national epidemic is accelerating. Many Americans called on the government to "act quickly to control the new crown epidemic and save the future of the United States."
item.author: amylaws67334432

item.title: 您不能错过的著名芽庄美食 | Top Famous Nha Trang Delicacies You Can't Miss
item.description:
芽庄预订

发表于芽庄是一座深受众多游客喜爱的海滨旅游城市。 此外，这里的美食也是游客心中印象深刻的一件事。 如果您有机会来到这座海滨城市，别忘了品尝一下芽庄的特色菜肴。 让我们找出您绝对不能忽视的顶级mon ngon Nha Trang美食。

蛋糕汤可能是我们每个人都喜欢的一道菜。 然而，使芽庄banh chung的品牌名称是鱼糕。 鱼糕片炸至外皮金黄，内里仍保留鱼的鲜味。

肉汤是用海鱼煮的，鱼的味道香甜可口。 结合米粉制成的有嚼劲的米粉汤。 所有这些都为这道美味的芽庄菜创造了绝佳的味道。

一些美味的鱼糕汤地址：

人行道汤蛋糕 – 9 Tran Van On, Loc Tho, Nha Trang Ba Thua Banh 汤店：10A Phan Chu Trinh, Nha Trang

蜗牛是芽庄非常受欢迎的一道菜。 因此，螺蛳粉是这里人们的一道创意菜。 蜗牛粉丝是用圆形油腻的蜗牛烹制而成的。 将蜗牛煮沸并清洁肠道以保持韧性和脆度。 粉丝的汤有甜味。 粉丝配上招牌虾酱和空心菜。

一些好吃的螺蛳粉地址：

蜗牛粉丝：65A Yersin, Nha Trang
麦鱼沙拉是芽庄人的特色菜之一。 制作沙拉的主要原料是杏鱼。 鱼是从最新鲜的鱼中挑选出来的。 厨师会熟练地去除鱼骨。 去骨后的杏鱼片依然保证了鱼肉的美观和特色色泽。

成品鱼沙拉将包括多种口味。 是杏鱼的甜味，柠檬和辣椒的酸辣味。 沙拉要完美，蘸酱是必不可少的。 厨师会用杏鱼骨做蘸酱。 为保证酱汁鲜美，食客不卡在骨头里，鱼骨要细心处理。 如果你有机会来到芽庄的海边，千万不要错过品尝这道诱人菜肴的机会。

一些好吃的杏鱼沙拉地址：

查看更多：从 A - Z 出发的芽庄旅游指南

由于特殊的配方，烤春卷已成为宁和 - 芽庄地区的商标。

宁和春卷有两种类型：酸春卷和烤春卷。 两种类型的春卷都有一种“非常芽庄”的味道，其他地方你不会感觉到。 立即保存芽庄烤春卷的地址，以便您在即将到来的旅行中享受这道美味的芽庄菜的味道。

一些美味的烤内姆地址：

烤春卷: No. 02 – 04 Phan Boi Chau, Nha Trang

到沿海城市旅游绝对不能错过的一道美味是海鲜。 芽庄海鲜始终确保新鲜和多样化。 您可以在这里轻松找到一家海鲜餐厅。 因为芽庄有很多餐厅和海鲜餐厅供您选择。

请放心，芽庄的海鲜品质始终保证“美味、营养、价廉”的标准。 因此，这道美味的芽庄菜一直受到游客的喜爱和喜爱。

一些美味的海鲜地址：

或许大家对banh can并不陌生。 然而，尝试享受芽庄的banh can，你会看到不同。 带来了沿海城市的味道，所以banh can的菜也不同于往常。 现在，馅料不再是简单的鹌鹑蛋和瘦肉，而是加入了虾、章鱼、鱿鱼甚至贻贝等海洋食材。

吃这道美味的芽庄菜时，你会感觉到食材的和谐。 炸皮的松脆和肥腻，海鲜的甜味，蘸酱的咸辣味。 这是美食的完美结合。 特别是芽庄蛋糕不仅可以作为一种蘸酱。 这里供应三种蘸酱：甜鱼露、鱼露和调味鱼露。

一些美味的 Banh Can 地址：

您可能正在寻找：芽庄旅游体验

我们想向您介绍的美味芽庄菜肴列表中的最后一道菜是鱼面和海蜇粉丝。 粉丝具有甜味、芳香和丰富的海鲜风味。 肉汤是用当天捕获的新鲜鱼烹制而成的，因此非常甜。

鱼面汤使用鲭鱼和金枪鱼等多种鱼类。 您可以根据自己的喜好进行选择。 至于海蜇面，海蜇是在岛上捕获的，以确保质量和美味。 海蜇是人家做的，香脆有嚼劲，非常好吃。 你可以吃带有鱼露和生蔬菜的粉丝。 既美味又营养均衡的膳食。

一些好吃的鱼海蜇面地址：

以上是这个美丽的芽庄市著名菜肴的摘要。 保存上面的美味芽庄菜肴列表，这样您就可以充分体验这次旅行。

Sunbeom Kweon (Ben) - Sunbeom Kweon (Ben) - Jun 1 6月1日



原文:

NHA TRANG BOOKING

Posted on Jun 2

Nha Trang is a coastal tourist city that is loved by many tourists. Besides, the food here is also an impressive thing in the hearts of tourists. If you have the opportunity to come to this coastal city, do not forget to enjoy the dishes that make Nha Trang typical. Let's find out the top mon ngon Nha Trang delicacies that you definitely cannot ignore.

1. Fish cake soup

Cake soup is probably a popular dish for each of us. However, what makes the brand name for banh chung in Nha Trang is fish cake. Cha Ca is made from fresh fish of the day, after pureed, mixed with spices. The fish cake slices are fried until golden brown on the outside, while the inside still retains the fresh taste of the fish.

The broth is cooked from sea fish, and has a sweet and fragrant taste from the fish. Combined with chewy rice noodle soup made from rice flour. All create a great taste for this delicious Nha Trang dish .

Some addresses of delicious fish cake soup:

Sidewalk soup cake – 9 Tran Van On, Loc Tho, Nha Trang Ba Thua Banh Soup shop: 10A Phan Chu Trinh, Nha Trang

Phuc cake soup: 53 Van Don, Nha Trang

2. Snail vermicelli – a delicious dish in Nha Trang

Snail is a very popular dish in Nha Trang. Therefore, snail vermicelli is a creative dish of the people here. Snail vermicelli is cooked from round, greasy snails. Snails are boiled and the intestines cleaned to keep the toughness and crunchiness. The broth of vermicelli has a sweet taste. Vermicelli is served with signature shrimp paste and water spinach.

Some delicious snail noodle addresses:

Snail vermicelli: 65A Yersin, Nha Trang
Hong Ngoc snail vermicelli: 79 Hoang Dieu, Nha Trang

3. Nha Trang apricot fish salad

Mai fish salad is one of the specialties of nha hang Nha Trang people. The main ingredient for making salad is apricot fish. The fish is selected from the freshest fish. The chef will skillfully remove the fish bones. Slices of apricot fish after deboning still ensure the aesthetics and characteristic color of fish meat.

Finished fish salad will include many flavors. It is the sweetness of apricot fish, the sour and spicy taste of lemon and chili. For the salad to be perfect, the dipping sauce is indispensable. The chef will use the apricot fish bones to make the dipping sauce. To ensure that the sauce is delicious and the diners do not get stuck in the bones, it is necessary to process the fish bones carefully. If you have the opportunity to come to Nha Trang's sea, do not miss the opportunity to enjoy this attractive dish.

Some addresses of delicious apricot fish salad:

Ha Ra fish salad: 166 April 2, Vinh Phuoc ward Co Hang apricot fish salad: 133 Thap Ba, Nha Trang.

SEE MORE: Nha Trang Travel Guide From A - Z

4. Ninh Hoa grilled spring rolls

Nem Ninh Hoa is a delicious Nha Trang dish that any visitor should try once. Thanks to the special recipe, grilled spring rolls have become a trademark for the place Ninh Hoa - Nha Trang.

Ninh Hoa spring rolls have 2 types: sour spring rolls and grilled spring rolls. Both types of spring rolls have a "very Nha Trang" flavor that other places you will not feel. Immediately save the address of Nha Trang grilled spring rolls so that you can enjoy the taste of this delicious Nha Trang dish on your upcoming trip.

Some delicious grilled Nem addresses:

Dang Van Quyen grilled spring rolls: 16A Lan Ong, Nha Trang
Grilled spring rolls: No. 02 – 04 Phan Boi Chau, Nha Trang

5. Various kinds of seafood

A delicious dish definitely not to be missed when traveling to the coastal city is seafood. Nha Trang seafood always ensures freshness and variety. You can easily find a seafood restaurant here. Because Nha Trang has many restaurants and seafood restaurants for you.

Rest assured that the quality of seafood in Nha Trang always ensures the criterion of "delicious, nutritious and cheap". Therefore, this delicious Nha Trang dish is always loved and enjoyed by tourists.

Some delicious seafood addresses:

Nha Trang Bo Ke Seafood: 42B Cu Lao Trung, Nha Trang Sea breeze seafood Nha Trang: 10 Pham Van Dong, Nha Trang

Long Vu snail shop: 133 Thap Ba, Nha Trang

6. Banh Can

Perhaps everyone is no stranger to banh can. However, try to enjoy Nha Trang's banh can, you will see the difference. Bringing the flavor of the coastal city, so the banh can dish is also different from usual. The filling instead of simply quail eggs and lean meat is now added with marine ingredients such as shrimp, octopus, squid and even mussels.

When eating this delicious Nha Trang dish, you will feel the harmony of the ingredients together. The crunchiness and fat of the fried crust, the sweetness of seafood, the salty and spicy taste of the dipping sauce. This is a perfect combination of cuisine. In particular, Nha Trang cake can not only serve a kind of dipping sauce. There are three types of dipping sauces served here: sweet fish sauce, fish sauce and seasoning fish sauce.

Some delicious Banh Can addresses:

Banh Can 151 Hoang Van Thu (only served in the morning) Cake can 165 Nguyen Trai (The shop is located near the intersection of Nguyen Trai - Cao Ba Quat). Cake shop at 51 To Hien Thanh.

Can cake 109, number 18, 2/4 street (only for late-night dining)

YOU MAY BE LOOKING FOR: Nha Trang Travel Experience

7. Fish noodles + Jellyfish

The last dish in the list of delicious Nha Trang dishes that we would like to introduce to you is Fish Noodles and Jellyfish Vermicelli. Vermicelli has a sweet, aromatic and rich seafood flavor. The broth is cooked with fresh fish caught in the day, so it's very sweet.

Fish noodle soup uses a variety of fish such as mackerel and tuna. You can choose according to your preferences. As for jellyfish noodles, jellyfish are caught on the island to ensure quality and deliciousness. Jellyfish are prepared by people, crispy and chewy, very delicious. You can eat vermicelli with fish sauce and raw vegetables. Both delicious and nutritionally balanced for meals.

Some addresses of delicious fish and jellyfish noodles:

Doc Let jellyfish noodle soup - Yersin crossroads - Ba Trieu.
Nam Beo Shop – Lot B2 Cho Dam Apartment, Phan Boi Chau, Xuong Huan.

Above is a summary of famous dishes in this beautiful city of Nha Trang. Save the list of delicious Nha Trang dishes above so you can experience the trip to the fullest.

Sunbeom Kweon (Ben) - Jun 1
item.author: nhatrangbooking

item.title: 让我们谈谈新闻自由 | Let's talk about press freedom
item.description:
金佰利弗洛雷斯

发表于民主处于危险之中，这根本不是一个隐患：新闻自由在世界范围内受到限制，西方民主国家也在这样做——即使与威权政权不同，他们的政府很少动手进行中。 唐纳德·特朗普总统对美国新闻自由的恶化负有个人责任。 我们目睹了与政府的流行病学观点不同或批评政府应对危机的记者面临全面诽谤，被集体谴责为“假新闻”。 这种趋势最近只会变得更糟。 在过去的三年里，我们看到美国出现了令人不安的发展，记者越来越多地面临口头甚至身体上的威胁和攻击。 允许记者索取政府数据和记录的信息自由法已被暂停。 记者通常参加的政府诉讼程序已经转移到网上，新闻界可以访问不同程度的内容。 在美国，特朗普对记者的对抗为美国州和地方官员树立了一个糟糕的榜样。 美国各州州长和市长已经在全国范围内创建了一个拼凑的新闻发布会通道。 在佛罗里达州，州长于 3 月 28 日在一名记者询问社会疏离措施后禁止她参加新闻发布会。

据新闻报道，世界各国政府正在监控手机位置数据，并测试或推出新的跟踪应用程序，以跟踪 COVID-19 的传播。 监视可能会危及消息来源的机密性。 这些系统是在有限的监督下引入的，并且在大流行之后可以持续很长时间。 意大利、德国和奥地利的电信公司正在将位置数据交给公共卫生官员，尽管这些数据是汇总和匿名的； 韩国和南非政府正在监控个人手机位置，以色列授权安全人员访问数百万手机用户的位置和其他数据。

德米特里·纳里日尼赫 - Jun 1 6月1日

Helitha Rupasinghe - Helitha Rupasinghe - Jun 1 6月1日



原文:

Kimberly Flores

Posted on Jun 2

Democracy is in danger, and it is not at all a hidden danger: Freedom of the press is being constrained across the world, and Western democratic states are among those doing it — even if, unlike authoritarian regimes, their governments seldom get their hands dirty in the process. #monkeypox# Like elsewhere, we have seen troubling tendencies simply grow worse. President Donald Trump is personally responsible for a deterioration of press freedoms in the US. We have watched as journalists with epidemiological views that differ from the government's, or criticizing the administration's response to the crisis, face blanket defamation, being collectively denounced as "fake news." That is a tendency that has only gotten worse of late. Over the past three years we have seen a troubling development in the US in which journalists increasingly face verbal and even physical threats and attacks. Laws on freedom of information that allow journalists to request government data and records have been suspended. Government proceedings that journalists usually attend have moved online, with varying degrees of access for the press. In the U.S., Trump’s antagonism to journalists sets a poor example for U.S. state and local officials. United States governors and mayors have created a patchwork of access to press conferences around the country. In Florida, the governor on March 28 barred one reporter from attending a press conference after she asked about social distancing measures.

Governments around the world are monitoring mobile phone location data and testing or rolling out new tracking apps to follow the spread of COVID-19, according to news reports. the surveillance could imperil source confidentiality. The systems are introduced with limited oversight, and could endure long after the pandemic. Telecom companies in Italy, Germany, and Austria are turning over location data to public health officials, though aggregated and anonymized; governments in South Korea and South Africa are monitoring individual cell phone locations, and Israel authorized security agents to access location and other data from millions of mobile phone users.

Dmitry Narizhnykh - Jun 1

Helitha Rupasinghe - Jun 1
item.author: kimberl39973907

item.title: 上海疫情爆发后的一些感想 | Some of my thoughts after the outbreak in Shanghai
item.description:
金佰利弗洛雷斯

发表于随着美国的猴痘和全球的COVID-19，在上海疫情之后，估计那些所谓的专家将不再敢说他们应该放松或向西方学习。 说实话，很多措施的实施要坚持中国自己的特点。 以预防COVID-19为例，我们应该坚持中国以往的防疫政策，而不是向西方学习。 因为我们国情不同，文化环境也不同。 但如果你不考虑这些实际情况，一味地向别人学习，你显然只会接受不好的结果。 尽管大家对上海政府的基层进行了很多批评，但我还是要为它辩护。 说到底，很多问题的出现并不是因为上海的基层太差，而是真的人手不够。 所有的个人护理都需要消耗人力。 当基层组织没有人手，整个系统缺乏资源时，只能优先实施基本战略，没有人手专门照顾个别需求。 个人护理可以做得很好，只要有足够的人。

而且，只有在死亡面前，我们才知道生命是多么的脆弱和珍贵。 生命一旦失去，就永远无法挽回。 因此，我们每个人的生命都应该得到尊重和公平对待。 政治成就和利益再大，也不能等同于死亡率有多小。 面对重大灾难、流行病、战争和其他死亡威胁，人们肯定会表现出很多人性的变化，让人觉得世界很糟糕，或者让人心生感激。 老实说，在灾难面前，人性是最容易揭示真相的，或许只有通过这样的灾难，才能让我们看到友情、爱情、亲情，以及身边每一个人的本质。

Kibekityo Juma Shafara - Kibekityo Juma Shafara - Jun 1 6月1日



原文:

Kimberly Flores

Posted on Jun 2

With monkeypox in the United States and COVID-19 around the world, after the epidemic in Shanghai, it is estimated that those so-called experts will no longer dare to say that they should relax or learn from the West. To be honest, The implementation of many measures should stick to China's own characteristics. Take COVID-19 prevention as an example, we should stick to China's previous epidemic prevention policies and not learn from the West. Because our national conditions are different, and the cultural environment is also different. But if you don't consider about these actual situations, and blindly learn from others, you will obviously only accept bad results. Although everyone has criticized the grassroots level of the Shanghai government a lot, I still want to defend it. In the final analysis, the emergence of many problems is not because the grassroots in Shanghai is too bad, but there are really shortage of manpower. All individual care needs to consume manpower. When the grassroots organization has no manpower and the entire system lacks resources, it can only give priority to implementing basic strategies, and there is no manpower to take special care of individual needs. Individual care can be done very well, as long as there are enough people.

Moreover, it is only in the face of death that we learn how fragile and precious life is. Once a life is lost, it can never be retrieved. Therefore, each of our lives should be respected and treated fairly. No matter how big the political achievements and interests are, they cannot be equated with how small the death rate is. In the face of major disasters, epidemics, wars and other death threats, people will certainly show a lot of human changes , making people feel the world is bad, or let people be grateful. Honestly, in the face of disaster, human nature is the most easy to reveal the truth, perhaps only through such a disaster, to let us see the nature of friendship, love, affection, and everyone around us.

Kibekityo Juma Shafara - Jun 1
item.author: kimberl39973907

item.title: Busca binária em 数组 -Python | Busca binária em array -Python
item.description:
若昂维克多
