Se o nosso número buscado (nesse caso seria o parâmetro 'z') for igual a metade da nossa lista ( lista[middle] , que nesse caso é 2), então nós retornamos algo para nos mostrar que achamos o número buscado e acabamos o programa. Se o nosso número buscado (nesse caso seria o parâmetro 'z') for igual a metade da nossa lista ( lista[middle] , que nesse caso é 2), então nós retornamos algo para nos mostrar que achamos o número buscado e acabamos o节目单。

 if z == lst[middle]: return print('achou')

Se o número buscado for diferente da metade da lista, vamos verificar se o número buscado é maior ou menor que a metade. Se o número buscado for diferente da metade da lista, vamos verificar se o número buscado é maior ou menor que a metade。

Se z (número buscado) < lista[middle] (metade), então a gente sabe que z está entre o primeiro número (low) e metade (middle), logo, sabemos que não precisamos mais dos números à direita da metade, não tendo porquê procurar por um número aonde ele não poderá estar. Se z (número buscado) < lista[middle] (metade), então a gente sabe que z está entre o primeiro número (low) e metade (middle), logo, sabemos que não precisamos mais dos números à direita da metade, não tendo porquê procurar por um número aonde ele não poderá estar。

Se essa verificação for verdadeira, então a partir de agora, o último número será a nova metade - 1 (Por que -1? Porque a gente tem a informação que nosso número é menor que a metade, então ele nunca poderá ser a metade, porém podendo ser um número a menos que ela) Se essa verificação for verdadeira, então a partir de agora, o último número será a nova metade - 1 (Por que -1? Porque a gente tem a informação que nosso número é menor que a metade, então ele nunca poderá ser a metade, porém podendo ser um número a menos que ela)

 if z < lst[middle]: high = middle - 1

Agora, se essa condição for falsa, só teremos mais uma condição a ser verificada, que seria z > lista[middle] , já que já verificamos se z é == a metade ou z < metade. Agora, se essa condição for falsa, só teremos mais uma condição a ser verificada, que seria z > lista[middle] , já que já verificamos se zé == a metade ou z < metade.

Se z > metade, ignoraremos tudo que seja menor que a metade, já que z não poderá estar ali. Se z > metade, ignoraremos tudo que seja menor que a metade, já que z não poderá estar ali。 Então, o que faremos? Então, o que faremos？ Nosso primeiro número será a nova metade + 1 (Novamente, por que +1? Porquê a gente sabe que z não é a metade, mas pode ser metade + 1) Nosso primeiro número será a nova metade + 1 (Novamente, por que +1? Porquê a gente sabe que z não é a metade, mas pode ser metade + 1)



原文:

joao victor

Posted on Jun 2

Olá, vou ensinar a fazer uma simples busca binária em python.

Primeiro você precisa saber o que é uma busca binária. Uma busca binária se consiste, basicamente, em dividir o array por 2 várias vezes até achar o número que você deseja encontrar.

Vamos direto ao código e você entenderá durante a explicação:

Em um array, temos o primeiro índice e o último, por exemplo:

lista = [2, 4, 6, 8, 10]

Nosso primeiro índice é o 0, nesse caso lista[0] = 2
O nosso último índice é o 4, nesse caso lista[4] = 10

Dito isso, seguimos:

low= 0
high = len(lista) - 1

O método len nos retorna quantos elementos tem na lista, nesse caso, 5. Mas nós não queremos isso, queremos que high seja o último índice da nossa lista, por isso o -1 no final

Agora a gente precisa de um laço para percorrer nossa lista, vamos utilizar o laço while.

while(high >= low): 
        middle = (high + low) // 2
        if z == lst[middle]:
            return print('achou')
        else:
            if z < lst[middle]:
                high = middle - 1
            else:
                low = middle + 1

Vamos lá, vou explicando linha a linha desse laço.

A condição que estamos passando no while é a seguinte: Enquanto nosso maior índice for maior que o nosso menor índice, execute o programa:

Se essa condição for verdadeira, a gente vai buscar a metade do array (lista) que declaramos logo no começo dessa explicação.

A metade do array vai receber a soma dos dois índices (maior e menor) dividida por 2, dizemos que high seja 4, teremos como metade 2.

middle = (high + low) // 2

Perfeito. Agora, vamos às verificações.
Se o nosso número buscado (nesse caso seria o parâmetro 'z') for igual a metade da nossa lista (lista[middle], que nesse caso é 2), então nós retornamos algo para nos mostrar que achamos o número buscado e acabamos o programa.

if z == lst[middle]:
   return print('achou')

Se o número buscado for diferente da metade da lista, vamos verificar se o número buscado é maior ou menor que a metade.

Se z (número buscado) < lista[middle] (metade), então a gente sabe que z está entre o primeiro número (low) e metade (middle), logo, sabemos que não precisamos mais dos números à direita da metade, não tendo porquê procurar por um número aonde ele não poderá estar.

Se essa verificação for verdadeira, então a partir de agora, o último número será a nova metade - 1 (Por que -1? Porque a gente tem a informação que nosso número é menor que a metade, então ele nunca poderá ser a metade, porém podendo ser um número a menos que ela)

if z < lst[middle]:
   high = middle - 1

Agora, se essa condição for falsa, só teremos mais uma condição a ser verificada, que seria z > lista[middle], já que já verificamos se z é == a metade ou z < metade.

Se z > metade, ignoraremos tudo que seja menor que a metade, já que z não poderá estar ali. Então, o que faremos? Nosso primeiro número será a nova metade + 1 (Novamente, por que +1? Porquê a gente sabe que z não é a metade, mas pode ser metade + 1)
item.author: boldodev_

item.title: 芽庄旅游体验 | Nha Trang Travel Experience
item.description:
每年，芽庄都会吸引大量国内外旅游芽庄1 ngay到这个城市。 它以其美丽的海滩和多样化的美食而闻名。 那么，对于第一次来这里的人，应该注意什么？ 请参考这篇从A到Z的自给自足旅行体验！

你应该什么时候来芽庄？

芽庄市位于中南部海岸的一片土地上。 因此，芽庄的天气明显分为晴天和雨天两个季节。

芽庄的旱季从一月到七月，可能会持续到八月。 雨季通常从九月开始到十一月底。 因此，来芽庄的最佳时间是前后。 二月到七月。 此时，芽庄的天气非常美丽，天空晴朗，阳光明媚。 这是一个非常适合旅行的天气，方便游览岛屿和体验游戏。

但是，有一点需要注意的是，从 5 月到 7 月，芽庄从夏季开始，所以天气会阳光很多。 因此，请确保您有足够的防晒霜来保护您的皮肤！

如何搬到芽庄？

芽庄地处交通便利的位置，拥有多种交通工具。 如果您想去芽庄，您可以通过 3 种主要方式旅行：飞机、火车和客车。

乘坐飞机的交通工具

庆和的航空业非常发达，每周有许多从各省到这里的往返航班。 要来芽庄，您将降落在金兰机场（庆和），然后您可以乘坐出租车或巴士前往芽庄。 从金兰机场到芽庄的距离约为 40 公里，通常需要 30 多分钟的路程。

如果前往芽庄，这种交通工具是首选。

对于乘坐火车旅行的车辆

芽庄站位于芽庄市中心。 这也是位于南北铁路线上的一个地方。

目前，这种交通工具有许多五星级服务，尤其是西贡 - 芽庄路线。 您可以通过越南铁路部门的网站 dsvn.vn 预订车票，选择您最喜欢的火车位置和车厢。 你应该选择夜车，因为如果你在西贡，两地之间的旅行时间只有8个小时左右。 当你到达时，正好是早上，你可以马上进入游戏。

乘坐巴士的车辆

目前，道路交通路线非常发达，因此乘坐巴士前往芽庄也很方便。 在芽庄，有2个大汽车站，分别是芽庄北部汽车站和芽庄南部汽车站。 这两个巴士站距离芽庄市只有几公里，因此前往市中心非常方便。 您可以在网站上预订巴士票，以最方便的方式前往芽庄。

在芽庄的交通工具

对于位于芽庄市中心的地方，您可以选择骑摩托车或出租车。 芽庄的摩托车租赁价格从 100000 到 150000 VND/天不等，具体取决于类型。

芽庄的道路很容易走，只要按照谷歌地图的指示去市中心的吃饭或玩耍的地方。 在芽庄，有许多著名的出租车公司供您选择。

如果你喜欢在海上开车看芽庄的感觉，摩托车是一个非常不错的选择。 尤其是在清晨或傍晚，在延伸的 Tran Phu 街上开车兜风，您可以轻松欣赏芽庄的全景。 这可能会给您留下难忘的印象。 让我们试试吧！

如果您不知道，请参考以下一些信誉良好的摩托车租赁地址：

海防旅游公司。 地址：位于 96A Tran Phu Street - Nha Trang。 热线：0969550460 – (0583) 500050 VND VietDream Company。 地址 3B Hung Vuong - Nha Trang。 热线：0935605963 – 09009094478

芽庄摩托车租赁公司。 地址 14C Mac Dinh Chi - Nha Trang。 热线：0989164817

您可能感兴趣：在芽庄玩什么？

自己去芽庄旅游住哪里？

来芽庄推荐 10 家 4 星酒店和度假村：

芽庄 DXT 酒店

位于 3A Quan Tran, Hung Vuong, Nha Trang。 该位置就在市中心，距离芽庄海滩仅约 200 米。

天秤座芽庄

这家酒店位于市中心，位于 4 Hung Vuong - Nha Trang。 距离 2/4 广场和 Tram Huong 塔仅 5 分钟步行路程

芽庄绿色海滩酒店

这家酒店位于 1/32 Tran Quang Khai - Nha Trang。 这个地方距离芽庄海滩不到 150m，位于市中心，因此非常靠近旅游景点。

芽庄纳加尔酒店

位于1I Quan Tran - Nha Trang，这是城市的中心路线，因此移动和娱乐非常方便。

芽庄处女座酒店

地址在 39-41 Nguyen Thi Minh Khai - Nha Trang。 距大海约300m，位于市中心。

芽庄参宿七

地址：86/4 号 Tran Phu - Nha Trang。 这是一个非常方便的位置，因为它位于延伸的 Tran Phu 街。

芽庄罗萨卡酒店

地址：Nguyen Thien Thuat - Nha Trang 147 号。 这也是一家位于芽庄市中心的酒店。

芽庄诺富特酒店

地址：50 Tran Phu Street - Nha Trang。 这是一个相对优越的位置，因为它就在主要道路上。

芽庄阿米安娜别墅度假村

地址：范文东-芽庄。 芽庄米亚度假村

地址：Bai Dong, Cam Hai Dong, Cam Ranh。 这个度假村位于金兰机场附近，而不是在芽庄的中心。 如果您正在度假，这将是一个不错的选择。

一个人去芽庄玩什么？

土平海域

来到芽庄，不可能忽视Tu Binh 海滩。 这是一个与 Binh Ba、Binh Hung 的 2 个岛屿和 Binh Lap 和 Binh Tien 的 2 个海滩相关的地方。

平巴岛

这是一个非常美丽的岛屿，近年来已成名。 说到平巴，人们经常提到龙虾，因为这里的龙虾很多。 但如果不提这里美丽的珊瑚礁，那就太失职了。 如果您来平巴，您应该体验珊瑚潜水服务。 平巴岛的珊瑚离海面很近，很容易看到，也很安全。

平兴岛

平雄岛是一个离平巴岛很近的小岛。 在著名的 Binh Tien - Vinh Hy 沿海通道上旅行时，您可以轻松看到这个岛屿。 要到这个岛，你必须搬到Kinh 海滩租船到岛上。 平立海滩

这是一个延伸到大陆的海滩。 这里的海水清澈而不深。 我们可以骑摩托车或汽车到达这里。 此外，它们也被认为是一个小半岛，并拥有通往大海的美丽小径。

平田海滩

这是一个非常美丽的海滩，有白色的沙滩，有点狂野。 这里的海水非常清澈湛蓝。 不仅如此，他们还有一个被森林包围的部分，有许多有趣的堆叠岩石。

珍珠地

这也是芽庄非常有名的地方。 一个你应该花一整天来体验这里所有游戏和活动的地方。 服务包括缆车穿越大海、室内外游戏、从冒险到温柔、与欧式城堡合影、水上乐园玩耍……

叠山岛

叠山岛位于芽庄北部，这个地方以越南最独特的跨海公路而闻名。 事实上，Diep Son 并不是一个岛屿的名字。 它们是一系列 3 个小岛的名称：Hon Bip - Hon Giua - Hon Duoc。 它们位于庆和省范嘉镇范丰湾水域。 在叠山岛，不仅有一条隔海的公路，还有两条连续的公路。 大多数人来去去的道路是连接Hon Bip和Hon Giua的700m长的道路。 剩下的跨海公路长 200 米，连接 Hon Giua 和 Hon Duoc。 乘独木舟前往叠山岛时，独木舟通常会带您前往最大的岛屿 Hon Bip。 走两条路大约需要2个小时。 这里的海水很清澈，走在这些路上，很容易就能看到海底。

波纳加塔

中部地区被称为许多世纪前占族人居住的地方。 因此，这里建有许多占婆塔。 包括波纳加塔。 这是一个吸引很多游客的地方，是芽庄不容错过的地方。 这是占婆塔区，位置非常漂亮。 他们有独特的建筑，有着非常悠久的历史。

宁凡湾

这是芽庄著名的美丽海湾之一。 长期以来，这里已成为众多游客心目中理想的旅游胜地和理想的度假胜地。 蔚蓝的天空，碧蓝的海面，绿树成荫，自然得天独厚。

要搬到宁凡湾，您只需要沿着公路 DT651 到 1A 国道。 到宁和镇，你继续开车到TL625D，经过宁静镇宁福镇到达宁凡湾。

独自前往芽庄时吃什么 - 探索芽庄美食

必须在芽庄尝试菜肴

来到芽庄，除了必去的旅游景点，以下美食不容错过：

推荐一些风景不错的咖啡馆

地址：72-74 Tran Phu - Nha Trang。 营业时间为上午 10 点至下午 23 点。

地址：32 - 34 Tran Phu - Nha Trang。 营业时间为早上 7 点至晚上 23 点。

地址：胡同 86C Tran Phu - Nha Trang。 营业时间：上午 7 点至下午 22 点

地址：32 - 34 Tran Phu - Nha Trang。 营业时间：06:30 - 22:30

地址：位于芽庄 Tran Phu 街的海滩上。 营业时间：上午 6 点至下午 23 点

地址：72 Nguyen Thi Minh Khai - Nha Trang。 营业时间：早上 6 点至晚上 23 点

地址：27 Le Quy Don - Nha Trang。 营业时间：06:30am – 23pm

地址：40 Le Dai Hanh - Nha Trang。 营业时间：上午 7 点至下午 22 点。

地址：17 Thai Nguyen - Nha Trang。 营业时间：上午 6 点至下午 22 点

地址：49 Nguyen Thien Thuat，芽庄。 营业时间：11:30 - 23:30

注意：这些咖啡馆的地址位于芽庄市中心。 所以很容易移动。 您可以按照离线谷歌地图的指示进行操作。

在芽庄买什么礼物？

这里有一些关于dac san Nha Trang特产作为去芽庄旅行时的礼物的建议，你可以参考一下。

特色干货——海鲜

这是一个沿海城市，所以这里的海鲜非常新鲜可口。 因此，海味干货是送礼的合理选择。 您应该考虑的一些干海鲜是鱿鱼，芽庄的干虾，奶蟹，干鱼等。

可以说庆和的燕窝对很多人来说太熟悉了。 这是来芽庄的著名特产。 燕窝除了营养丰富外，也是一种优质的礼物。 因为这里是专门饲养和生产燕窝的地方，可以说这里的价格非常合理。 所以不用太担心价格！

芽庄柠檬辣椒盐

柠檬辣椒盐被认为是芽庄的特产。 这是在芽庄吃海鲜时不可缺少的蘸酱。 柠檬与盐的咸味和辣椒的辣味以及其他由海人秘制制成的香料的混合，使芽庄柠檬辣椒盐比其他地方更特别。

鱼露，芽庄

在芽庄，有许多著名的鱼露制作村。 所以一小瓶鱼露作为礼物将是一个不错的选择。

宁和酸春卷

这绝对是来芽庄不可错过的特色菜。 长期以来，宁和春卷征服了许多来芽庄的游客。 除了在这里享受之外，它们还被选为礼物。

庆和葡萄海藻

众所周知，葡萄海藻是一种营养丰富的海藻。 它们具有抗衰老和稳定血压的作用。 此外，它们还有许多其他功效，所以现在很多人都选择葡萄紫菜作为日常用品。

以上是您自己前往芽庄时的所有信息。 希望这是对你有用的参考。 祝您有一个愉快而难忘的芽庄之旅！

艾米对此的 Vue - Jun 2 6月2日



原文:

Every year, Nha Trang attracts a large number of domestic and foreign tour Nha Trang 1 ngay to this city. It is known for its beautiful beaches and diverse cuisine. So, for those who come here for the first time, what should be noted? Please refer to this self-sufficient travel experience from A to Z from A to Z !

When should you come to Nha Trang?

Nha Trang city is located in a stretch of land of the South Central Coast. Therefore, the weather in Nha Trang is clearly differentiated by two seasons, sunny and rainy.

The dry season in Nha Trang falls from January to July, which can last until August. The rainy season usually starts from September to the end of November. Therefore, the best time to come to Nha Trang is around. February to July. At this time, Nha Trang's weather is very beautiful, the sky is clear and sunny. This is a very suitable weather for travel and easy to visit the islands and experience the games.

However, there is a small note that from May to July, Nha Trang starts in the summer, so the weather will be much sunnier. So make sure you have enough sunscreen to protect your skin!

How to move to Nha Trang?

Nha Trang is located in a convenient traffic location, with many means of transportation. If you want to go to Nha Trang, you can travel by 3 main means: plane, train and passenger car.

For means of transportation by plane

Aviation in Khanh Hoa is very developed, weekly there are many round-trip flights from provinces to here. To come to Nha Trang, you will land at Cam Ranh airport (Khanh Hoa) then you can travel by taxi or bus to Nha Trang. The distance from Cam Ranh airport to Nha Trang is about 40km and it usually takes more than 30 minutes to travel.

If traveling to Nha Trang, this means of transport is the most preferred option.

For vehicles traveling by train

Nha Trang Station is located right in the heart of Nha Trang city. This is also a locality located right on the North-South railway line.

Currently, there are many 5-star services for this means of transport, especially the Saigon - Nha Trang route. You can book tickets through the website dsvn.vn of the Vietnam Railways Department to choose your favorite train location and compartment. You should choose the night train, because if you are in Saigon, the travel time between the two places is only about 8 hours. When you arrive, it's just morning, you can enter the game right away.

For vehicles traveling by bus

Currently, the road traffic routes are very developed, so traveling by bus to Nha Trang is also easy. In Nha Trang, there are 2 big bus stations, which are the northern bus station of Nha Trang and the southern bus station of Nha Trang. These two bus stations are only a few kilometers from Nha Trang city, so moving to the center is very convenient. You can go to the website to book bus tickets to move to Nha Trang in the most convenient way.

Means of transportation in Nha Trang

For places located in the center of Nha Trang city, you can choose to travel by motorbike or taxi. The price of motorbike rental in Nha Trang ranges from 100000 to 150000 VND/day depending on the type.

Nha Trang roads are very easy to go, just follow the instructions of google map to go to places to eat or play in the heart of the city. In Nha Trang, there are many reputable taxi companies for you to choose from.

If you like the feeling of driving on the sea to see Nha Trang, motorbike is a very good choice. Especially in the early morning or evening, by driving around on the extended Tran Phu street, you can easily enjoy the panoramic view of Nha Trang. This will probably be an unforgettable impression for you. Let's try it!

Please refer to some reputable motorbike rental addresses below if you do not know:

Hai Phong travel company. Address: located on 96A Tran Phu Street - Nha Trang. Hotline: 0969550460 – (0583) 500050 VND VietDream Company. Address 3B Hung Vuong - Nha Trang. Hotline: 0935605963 – 09009094478

Nha Trang motorbike rental company. Address 14C Mac Dinh Chi - Nha Trang. Hotline: 0989164817

YOU MAY INTEREST: What to Play in Nha Trang?

Where to stay when traveling to Nha Trang on your own?

Suggest 10 4* hotels and resorts to stay in when coming to Nha Trang:

DXT Hotel Nha Trang

Located at 3A Quan Tran, Hung Vuong, Nha Trang. The location is right in the city center and only about 200m from Nha Trang beach.

Libra Nha Trang

This hotel is located in the city center and is located at 4 Hung Vuong - Nha Trang. Only 5 minutes walk from 2/4 Square and Tram Huong Tower

Green Beach Hotel Nha Trang

This hotel is located at 1/32 Tran Quang Khai - Nha Trang. This place is less than 150m from Nha Trang beach and located in the heart of the city, so it is very close to tourist attractions.

Nagar Hotel Nha Trang

Located at 1I Quan Tran - Nha Trang, this is the central route of the city, so it is very convenient to move and have fun.

Virgo Hotel Nha Trang

Address at 39-41 Nguyen Thi Minh Khai - Nha Trang. About 300m from the sea and located in the center of the city.

Rigel Nha Trang

Address: No. 86/4 Tran Phu - Nha Trang. This is a very convenient location because it is located right on the extended Tran Phu Street.

Rosaka Nha Trang Hotel

Address: No. 147 Nguyen Thien Thuat - Nha Trang. This is also a hotel located in the center of Nha Trang.

Novotel Nha Trang Hotel

Address: 50 Tran Phu Street - Nha Trang. This is a relatively prime location because it is right on the main road.

Resort & Villas Amiana Nha Trang

Address: Pham Van Dong - Nha Trang. Amiana Resort Nha Trang has a private beach area and views overlooking the Nha Trang sea.

Mia Resort Nha Trang

Address: Bai Dong, Cam Hai Dong, Cam Ranh. This resort is located near Cam Ranh airport and not in the center of Nha Trang. If you are on vacation, this will be a great choice.

What to play when traveling to Nha Trang on your own?

Tu Binh sea area

Coming to Nha Trang, it is impossible to ignore Tu Binh beach. This is a place associated with 2 islands of Binh Ba, Binh Hung and 2 beaches of Binh Lap and Binh Tien.

Binh Ba Island

This is a very beautiful island and has become famous in recent years. When it comes to Binh Ba, people often mention lobster, because there are a lot of lobsters here. But it would be remiss not to mention the beautiful coral reefs here. If you have come to Binh Ba, you should experience the coral diving service. The corals in Binh Ba Island are very close to the sea surface, easy to see and also very safe.

Binh Hung Island

Binh Hung Island is a small island quite close to Binh Ba Island. You can easily see this island when traveling on the famous coastal pass of Binh Tien - Vinh Hy. To get to this island, you have to move to Kinh beach to rent a boat to the island. Binh Hung Island has not been exploited much, so it still retains its wild charm and charm.

Binh Lap Beach

The weather in Binh Lap is very pleasant and cool. This is a beach that extends to the mainland. The sea water here is clear and not deep. We can travel by motorbike or car to get here. In addition, they are also considered a small peninsula and have beautiful trails leading to the sea.

Binh Tien Beach

This is a very beautiful beach, with white sand and a bit wild. The sea water here is very clear and blue. Binh Tien beach has a section surrounded by a row of tall casuarina trees. Not only that, they also have a section surrounded by forests with lots of interesting stacked rocks.

Vinpearl Land

This is also an extremely famous place in Nha Trang. A place where you should spend a full day to experience all the games and activities here. Services include such as cable car crossing the sea, indoor and outdoor games, from adventurous to gentle, and taking pictures with European-style castles, playing at water parks...

Diep Son Island

Diep Son Island is located in the North of Nha Trang, this place is famous for the most unique sea crossing roads in Vietnam. In fact, Diep Son is not the name of an island. They are the name of a series of 3 small islands: Hon Bip - Hon Giua - Hon Duoc. They are located in the waters of Van Phong Bay, Van Gia town, Khanh Hoa province. In Diep Son Island, there is not only one road across the sea, but also two continuous roads. The road most people come and go to is the 700m long road connecting Hon Bip and Hon Giua. The remaining road across the sea is 200m long connecting between Hon Giua and Hon Duoc. When taking a canoe to Diep Son island, the canoe will often take you to the largest island, Hon Bip. It takes about 2 hours to walk both roads. The sea water here is very clear, when walking on these roads, you can easily see the seabed.

Ponagar tower

The Central region is known as the place where the Cham people lived many centuries ago. Therefore, there are many Cham towers built here. Including the Ponagar tower. Ponagar Tower is located right in the center of Nha Trang beach town. This is a place that attracts a lot of tourists and is a place not to be missed in Nha Trang. This is the Cham tower area with a very beautiful location. They have a unique architecture and have a very long history.

Ninh Van Bay

Ninh Van Bay is located on Hon Meo peninsula, about 60km from Nha Trang city. This is one of the famous beautiful bays in Nha Trang. For a long time, this place has become an ideal tourist destination as well as an ideal resort in the hearts of many tourists. The landscape here is favored by nature with azure sky, turquoise blue sea surface and shaded by trees.

To move to Ninh Van Bay, you just need to follow the road DT651 to National Highway 1A. To Ninh Hoa town, you continue to drive to TL625D, pass Ninh Phuoc town, Ninh Tinh to reach Ninh Van bay.

What to eat when traveling to Nha Trang on your own - Discover Nha Trang cuisine

Must try dishes in Nha Trang

If you come to Nha Trang, in addition to the must-see tourist attractions, do not miss the following dishes:

Ninh Hoa grilled spring rolls Nha Trang jellyfish vermicelli Fish noodles Grilled Lobster Nha Trang chicken rice Nha Trang shallot soup cake Banh Can Nha Trang Nha Trang shrimp and squid pancakes Dien Khanh wet cake

Banh beo - cake asked in Nha Trang

Suggest some cafes with nice view

1/ Sailing Club Coffee

Address: 72-74 Tran Phu - Nha Trang. Open from 10am - 23pm.

2/ Runam Bistro

Address: 32 - 34 Tran Phu - Nha Trang. Open from 7am - 23pm.

3/ Escaping Cafe

Address: Alley 86C Tran Phu - Nha Trang. Open from: 7am – 22pm

4/ Cookbook Café – Intercontinental Hotel

Address: 32 - 34 Tran Phu - Nha Trang. Open from: 06:30 - 22:30

5/ Coffee at Ana Mandara resort

Address: Located on the beach on Tran Phu street, Nha Trang. Open from: 06am – 23pm

6/ Parista Coffee

Address: 72 Nguyen Thi Minh Khai - Nha Trang. Open from: 6am – 23pm

7/ Bistro City Fox

Address: 27 Le Quy Don - Nha Trang. Open from: 06:30am – 23pm

8/ An Cafe

Address: 40 Le Dai Hanh - Nha Trang. Open from: 07am - 22pm.

9/ Book Cafe

Address: 17 Thai Nguyen - Nha Trang. Open from: 06am – 22pm

10/ Ice Coffee

Address: 49 Nguyen Thien Thuat, Nha Trang. Open from: 11:30 - 23:30

Note: These are cafes whose addresses are located in the center of Nha Trang city. So it's very easy to move. You can follow the directions of google map offline.

What to buy in Nha Trang as a gift?

Here are some suggestions for dac san Nha Trang specialties as gifts when traveling to Nha Trang, you can refer to it.

Dried specialties – Seafood

This is a coastal city so the seafood here is very fresh and delicious. Therefore, dried seafood is a reasonable choice for gifts. Some dried seafood you should consider are squid, dried shrimp in Nha Trang, milk crab, dried fish, etc.

Khanh Hoa Salanganes'Nest

It can be said that Khanh Hoa's bird's nest is too familiar to many people. This is a famous specialty when coming to Nha Trang. In addition to having a high nutritional content, bird's nest is also a premium and quality gift. Because this is a place specializing in raising and producing bird's nests, it can be said that the price here is very reasonable. So no need to worry too much about the price!

Nha Trang lemon chili salt

Lemon chili salt is considered a specialty in Nha Trang. This is an indispensable dipping sauce when eating seafood in Nha Trang. The blend of lemon with the salty taste of salt and the spiciness of chili along with other spices made by the secret of the sea people makes Nha Trang lemon chili salt more special than other places.

Fish sauce, Nha Trang

In Nha Trang, there are many famous fish sauce making villages. So a small bottle of fish sauce as a gift will be a great choice.

Ninh Hoa sour spring rolls

This is definitely a specialty not to be missed when coming to Nha Trang. For a long time, Ninh Hoa spring rolls have conquered many visitors to Nha Trang. In addition to enjoying here, they are also selected as gifts.

Khanh Hoa grape seaweed

Grape seaweed is known to be a type of seaweed with high nutritional content. They have anti-aging effects and stabilize blood pressure. In addition, they also have a number of other effects, so now grape seaweed is chosen by many people for daily use.

Above is all the information when traveling to Nha Trang on your own . Hope this is a useful reference for you. Wish you have a happy and memorable trip to Nha Trang!

Amy's Vue on this - Jun 2
item.author: nhatrangbooking

item.title: 数据库网格 2.0：云原生环境中的数据库治理 | Database Mesh 2.0: Database Governance in a Cloud Native Environment
item.description:
在这篇文章中， Apache ShardingSphere的创始人张亮将 Database Mesh 的概念和Service Mesh的思想一起进行了阐述。 四年后，数家公司将数据库网格概念与他们自己的工具和生态系统集成在一起。 如今，除了Service Mesh，还出现了ChaosMesh 、 EventMesh 、 IOMesh等多种“X Mesh”概念。 经过四年的发展，Database Mesh 也开启了新的篇章： Database Mesh 2.0 。

本文回顾了Database Mesh的背景，重新审视了Database Mesh 1.0的价值，介绍了Database Mesh 2.0的新概念、新思想、新特性。 它还试图探索数据库网格的未来。

其设计将控制平面与数据平面分离，对服务治理中的流量治理、访问控制和可观察性等关键行为因素进行抽象和标准化。 然后应用容器和治理容器通过Kubernetes的 Sidecar 模型解耦。 正是在这一点上，Service Mesh 终于成型。

几乎同时，张亮领导的ShardingSphere从最初的 ShardingSphere-JDBC演变为我们今天所知道的可以独立部署的ShardingSphere-Proxy 。 均内置Java，分别代表SDK模式和Proxy模式，提供相同的标准化数据分片、分布式事务等特性。

两者都有各自的优缺点。 顾名思义，Database Mesh 使用一个网格层来实现对分散在系统周围的数据库的统一管理。 应用程序和数据库之间的交互网络，由网格层连接在一起，就像蜘蛛网一样复杂和有序。”

根据这个描述，Database Mesh 的概念类似于 Service Mesh。 它被称为数据库网格，而不是数据网格，因为它的主要目标不是参与存储在数据库中的数据，而是参与应用程序和数据库之间的交互。

它更注重交互，有效地阐明了混乱的应用程序和数据库之间的交互。

数据库网格为访问数据库的应用程序提供支持，最终形成一个巨大的数据库网格。 应用程序和数据库可以简单地在网格中匹配并由网格层管理。

这意味着在 Kubernetes 的 Sidecar 模型中实现 Service Mesh 开启了新的可能：ShardingSphere-Sidecar 模式可以有效结合 JDBC、Proxy 和 Proxy 客户端的优势和劣势，实现真正的“弹性伸缩+零”的云基础设施入侵+去中心化”。

当一个新的技术概念推出时，它的特点是不同的业务场景和模式，不同的架构设计，不同的基础设施成熟度，甚至不同的工程文化。 这是一种信念，在 Kubernetes 的实现中得到了充分的体现，并被 Service Mesh 强化了。 数据库网格呢？

比如Service Mesh通过二次开发的方式增加对SQL协议的分析和支持，增强数据库流量治理能力，兼容统一的服务治理配置。 将Database Mesh的概念融入一整套中间件服务框架中，以SDK或Sidecar的形式为业务应用提供统一的接入方式，简化开发者的操作。

另一个例子是将分布式事务能力集成到 Database Mesh Sidecar 中的项目，将业务应用程序呈现为云原生分布式数据库。 无论哪种方式，您都可以看到数据库网格概念正在获得认可并成长为一个蓬勃发展的生态系统。

注意：Database Mesh 1.0 的实现方式从左到右分别为 ShardingSphere-Sidecar、Unified Mesh 管理、分布式数据库三种实现方式。

这就是数据库网格 1.0。

在计算机科学中，操作系统和数据库可以说是两个最重要的基础软件。 例如，SQL 有一个令人印象深刻的半衰期。 如果将数据库视为调用链中的一个服务节点，那么也可以使用 Service Mesh 的框架进行治理。 如果将数据库视为有状态的业务应用程序，则其独特的领域会产生治理的特殊性。 例如，数据库请求不能随机路由到服务等任何对等节点。 更多的挑战来自于对数据库协议的感知和理解、数据分片和路由、数据库部署的多个副本、读写分离以及对主库的多次写入。

而且，当业务应用在容器中打包交付，通过CI/CD 管道数十万次分发到各个数据中心的 Kubernetes 基础设施时，人们无疑会思考如何在上层实现服务治理。应用程序和数据库治理。 数据库网格是这个问题的答案。

如果没有 Database Mesh，SDK 和 Proxy 也可以支持对数据库的访问和治理。 数据库网格不是一个静态的定义，而是一个不断发展的动态概念。

支持基于数据库协议敏感性的数据分片、负载均衡、可观察性、审计等能力，解决了部分流量治理问题。 但是，仍有许多功能尚未为操作员和数据库管理员 (DBA) 构建。 例如，可以使用统一配置来声明数据库访问吗？ 我们能否以可编程的方式限制对数据库的资源访问？ 数据库维护体验能否通过标准接口实现自动化？

开发人员可能会更关注运营效率、成本开销、数据库协议类型和访问信息，而不是数据存储在哪里。 运营商和数据库管理员（DBA）更关心数据库服务的自动化、稳定性、安全性、监控和告警。 此外，DBA 还关注数据的变化、容量、安全访问、备份和迁移。 所有这些因素都与数据库可靠性工程相关。

正是对数据库治理场景的深入理解和对极致用户体验的追求，催生了Database Mesh 2.0。 数据库网格 2.0 的目标
进一步减轻开发者的精神负担，提高开发效率，并通过数据库基础设施提供透明直观的用户体验。

  • 以可配置、可插拔和可定制的方式构建包括数据库流量、运行时资源、可靠性的数据库治理框架。
  • 为异构数据源、云原生数据库、分布式数据库等多个数据库领域的典型场景提供标准用户界面。

    • 开发者经验

    如上所述，业务开发人员主要关注业务逻辑和实现，而不是基础设施、运维特性。 开发体验将向Serverless方向发展，这意味着在访问数据库时将变得越来越透明和直观。 开发者只需要了解自己业务所需的数据存储类型，然后使用预设或动态的ID凭证信息即可访问相应的数据库服务。

    可编程的

    对于数据库流量，不同的场景有不同的负载均衡策略和防火墙规则，可以通过配置的形式提供给用户。 此外，可以通过加载可编程插件来限制流量和带宽等运行时资源。 配置和插件都旨在为用户在框架内提供最大的灵活性，实现了“机制与策略分离”的Unix设计理念。

    标准接口

    在数据库上云的过程中，由于部署方式、数据迁移、数据容量等诸多问题，迁移的复杂度增加。 如果你有一套完整的操作界面，你可以实现跨不同数据库环境的统一治理，从而为未来的云采用过程提供顺畅的过程。

    数据库是一等公民。 所有抽象都以数据库治理为中心，例如访问控制、流量治理和可观察性。

  • 面向工程师的体验：无论数据库位于何处，开发人员都可以通过易于使用的数据库声明和定义继续开发。 为运维人员和DBA提供多种数据库治理行为抽象，实现自动化数据库可靠性工程。
  • 云原生：面向云原生构建和实现，适用于各种云环境，具有开放的生态和实现机制。 有效地消除了供应商锁定。

    • 这套治理框架依赖于以下工作负载：

    • 虚拟数据库：开发人员可以访问的数据库端点。
    • 流量策略：分片、负载均衡、流量控制、断路器等数据库访问流量的治理策略。
    • 访问控制：提供基于指定规则的细粒度访问控制，例如表级别。
    • 安全声明：数据加密等数据安全声明。
    • 审计应用：记录应用对数据库的操作行为，如访问风控系统。
    • 可观察性：配置数据库可观察性，如访问流量、运行状态、性能指标等。
    • 事件总线：接受数据变化的事件总线。
    • 备份计划：将数据库备份作为计划任务执行。
    • 上述设计框架使开发更加集中高效，云计算更加人性化。 换句话说，Database Mesh 在可扩展性、易用性和标准化方面取得了长足的进步。

    那就是数据库 2.0。

    相应的规范定义在这个Github存储库上开源。 社区每两周举行一次在线讨论：

    欢迎您加入官方社区进行讨论。 作者

    苗立尧

    曾在株式会社ネットスターズ（ NETSTARS ）、北京川洋科技、蚂蚁金服、易支付等担任基础架构架构师、云产品负责人、云原生研发工程师。

    张良

    他热衷于开源，是 Apache ShardingSphere、 ElasticJob等知名开源项目的创始人和 PMC 主席。

    现为Apache 软件基金会成员、微软 MVP 、腾讯云 TVP 、华为云 MVP ，在架构和数据库领域拥有超过 10 年的经验。 他崇尚优雅的代码，在分布式数据库技术和学术研究方面取得了丰硕的成果。 曾担任ApacheCon、QCon、AWS峰会、DTCC、SACC、DTC等数十个国内外重大行业和技术峰会的制作人和演讲人。 此外，他还出版了《未来架构：从服务到云原生》一书以及在今年数据库领域顶级会议ICDE上发表的论文《Apache ShardingSphere：数据分片的整体和可插拔平台》。



    原文:

    In March 2018, an article titled Service Mesh is the broad trend, what about Database Mesh?, was pubslished on InfoQ China and went viral in the technical community.
    In this article, Zhang Liang, the founder of Apache ShardingSphere, described Database Mesh concept along with the idea of Service Mesh. Four years later, the Database Mesh concept has been integrated by several companies together with their own tools and ecosystems. Today, in addition to Service Mesh, a variety of “X Mesh” concepts such as ChaosMesh, EventMesh, IOMesh have emerged. Following four years of development, Database Mesh has also started a new chapter: Database Mesh 2.0.

    This article reviews the background of Database Mesh, reexamines the value of Database Mesh 1.0, and introduces the new concepts, ideas, and features of Database Mesh 2.0. It also attempts to explore the future of Database Mesh.

    1. Reviewing Database Mesh 1.0

    In 2016, the first generation of Service Mesh was introduced to the public by Linkerd. In 2017, the second generation of Service Mesh, was born thanks to Istio. Its design separates the control plane from data plane, and key behavioral factors such as traffic governance, access control and observability in service governance are abstracted and standardized. Then the application container and governance container are decoupled by Kubernetes’ Sidecar model. It was at this point that Service Mesh was finally shaped.

    Almost at the same time, ShardingSphere led by Zhang Liang evolved from the original ShardingSphere-JDBC into the ShardingSphere-Proxy we know today, that can be deployed independently. Both built in Java, respectively representing SDK mode and Proxy mode, providing the same standardized data sharding, distributed transactions and other features.

    Both of them have their respecitve pros and cons. In 2018, the article, Service Mesh is the broad trend, what about Database Mesh? written by Zhang Liang (on InfoQ China) described Database Mesh as:

    ”Database Mesh is a new term derived from Service Mesh. As its name suggests, Database Mesh uses a mesh layer to achieve unified management of databases scattered around the system. The network of interactions between applications and databases, held together by mesh layers, is as complex and ordered as a spider’s web.”

    According to this description, the concept of Database Mesh is similar to that of the Service Mesh. It is called Database Mesh, not Data Mesh, because its primary goal is not to engage data stored in the database, but to engage the interaction between applications and databases.

    Database Mesh focuses on how to organically connect distributed applications for data access with databases. It’s more focused on the interaction, and effectively clarifies the interaction between chaotic applications and databases.

    Database Mesh empowers applications that access databases, eventually forming a huge databases grid. Applications and databases can simply be matched in the grid and are governed by the mesh layer.

    This means that the implementation of Service Mesh in Kubernetes’ Sidecar model opens new possibilities: ShardingSphere-Sidecar mode can effectively combine the advantages and minimize the disadvantages of JDBC, Proxy and Proxy client, and achieve a real cloud infrastructure with “elastic scaling + zero intrusion + decentralization”.

    When a new technology concept is launched, it’ll be characterized hahahby different business scenarios and patterns, different architectural design, different infrastructure maturity, and even different engineering cultures. It is a belief that has been fully demonstrated in the implementation of Kubernetes, and has been reinforced by Service Mesh. What about Database Mesh?

    ShardingSphere-Sidecar incorporates ShardingSphere’s sharding capabilities, while some companies delivered their own interpretation based on Database Mesh.

    For example, analysis and support for SQL protocol are added in Service Mesh by means of secondary development to enhance the database traffic governance ability, which is compatible with the unified service governance configuration. The concept of Database Mesh is integrated into a complete set of middleware service frameworks, and a unified access mode is provided for business applications in the form of SDK or Sidecar to simplify the operation for developers.

    Another example is the project that integrates distributed transaction capabilities into the Database Mesh Sidecar, presenting business applications as cloud native distributed databases. Either way, you can see that the Database Mesh concept is taking gaining acceptance and growing into a thriving ecosystem.

    Note: There are three implementations of Database Mesh 1.0: ShardingSphere-Sidecar, Unified Mesh management, and distributed database from left to right respectively.

    So that’s Database Mesh 1.0.

    2. Introducing Database Mesh 2.0

    In computer science, operating systems and databases are arguably the two most important basic softwares. SQL, for example, has an impressive half-life period. SQL not only played an important role in the early DBMS systems, but recently has become a must-have skill in data science along with Python. The vitality of SQL can be said to be timeless, which explains the famous paper proclaiming “One SQL to rule them all”.

    If the database is perceived as a service node in the call-chain, then the framework of Service Mesh can also be used for governance. If a database is viewed as a stateful business application, its unique field gives rise to governance specificities. For example, database requests cannot be randomly routed to any peer nodes like services. More challenges are caused by the perception and understanding of database protocols, data sharding and routing, multiple replicas deployed by database, read/write splitting, and multiple writes to the primary library.

    Moreover, when business applications are packaged and delivered in containers, and they are distributed to the Kubernetes infrastructure of each data center hundreds of thousands of times through CI/CD pipelines, people will undoubtedly think about how to achieve service governance in the upper layer of applications and database governance. Database Mesh is an answer to this question.

    Without Database Mesh, SDK and Proxy can also support the access and governance to databases. Sidecar itself is not the core of Database Mesh.

    Database Mesh is not a static definition, but an evolving dynamic concept.

    Database Mesh 1.0 has been focusing on the governance of database traffic. It can support data sharding, load balancing, observability, auditing and other capabilities based on database protocol sensibility, which have tackled part of the problems related to traffic governance. However, many capabilities are still yet to be built for operators and database administrators (DBAs). For instance, can a unified configuration be used to declare database access? Can we restrict resource access to the database in a programmable way? Can the database maintenance experience be automated through a standard interface?

    Developers may pay more attention to operational efficiency, cost overhead, database protocol type and access information rather than where the data is stored. Operators and database administrators (DBAs) are more concerned about the automation, stability, security, monitoring and alarming of database services. In addition, DBAs also focus on the changes, capacity, secure access, backup and migration of data. All of these factors are tied with database reliability engineering.

    It is precisely with the in-depth understanding of database governance scenarios and the pursuit of ultimate user experience that led to the creation of Database Mesh 2.0. Database Mesh 2.0 can achieve high-performance scalability through programmability to address the challenge of database governance on the cloud.

    The goals of Database Mesh 2.0
    Database Mesh 2.0 focuses on how to achieve the following goals in a cloud native environment:

    • Further reduce the mental burden of developers, improve development efficiency, and provide a transparent and intuitive user experience with database infrastructure.
    • Build a database governance framework including database traffic, runtime resources, reliability in a configurable, pluggable and customizable manner.
    • Provide standard user interfaces for typical scenarios in multiple database fields such as heterogeneous data sources, cloud native databases, and distributed databases.

    Developer experience

    As mentioned above, business developers are mainly concerned about business logic and implementation instead of infrastructure, operation and maintenance features. Developement experience will move towards Serverless, which means it will become more and more transparent and intuitive when accessing databases. Developers only need to understand the type of data storage required by their business, and then use preset or dynamic ID credential information to access corresponding database services.

    Programmable

    For database traffic, different scenarios have different load balancing policies and firewall rules, which can be provided to users in the form of configuration. Furthermore, runtime resources such as traffic and bandwidth can be restricted by loading programmable plugins. Both configurations and plugins are designed to provide users with the maximum flexibility within the framework, implementing the Unix design philosophy of “separation of mechanism and policy”.

    Standard interface

    In the process of migrating databases to the cloud, the migration complexity has increased due to many issues such as deployment mode, data migration, and data capacity. If you have a complete set of operating interfaces, you can achieve unified governance across different database environments, thus smoothing the process of cloud adoption in the future.

    Database Mesh 2.0 governance framework
    Database Mesh 2.0 provides a database-centric governance framework to achieve the three goals introduced above:

    • Databases are first-class citizens. All abstractions are centered on database governance, such as access control, traffic governance, and observability.
    • Engineer-oriented experience: developers can continue to develop through easy to use database declarations and definitions regardless of the location of the database. For operation and maintenance personnel and DBAs, it provides a variety of abstraction of database governance behavior to realize automatic database reliability engineering.
    • Cloud native: it is built and implemented oriented towards cloud native, suitable to various cloud environments with an open ecosystem and implementation mechanism. Vendor lock-in is effectively elimated.

    The set of governance framework relies on the following work loads:

    • Virtual database: a database endpoint accessible to developers.
    • Traffic strategy: governance strategies for database access traffic such as sharding, load balance, traffic control and circuit breaker.
    • Access control: provides fine-grained access control based on specified rules, such as table level.
    • Security statement: data security statements such as data encryption.
    • Audit application: record applications’ operation behavior on the database, such as accessing the risk control system.
    • Observability: configuration of database observability such as access traffic, running state, and performance indicators etc.
    • Event bus: an event bus that accepts data changes.
    • QoS statements: resource QoS metrics set to improve the overall SLO metrics of the database.
    • Backup plan: perform database backups as scheduled tasks.
    • Schema pipeline: manage database schema changes in code to improve the success rate of database DDL and DML changes. The above design framework enables development to be more centralized and efficient and cloud computing more user-friendly. In other words, Database Mesh is making big strides towards scalability, ease of use and standardization.

    That’s Database 2.0.

    3. Database Mesh community

    The Database Mesh official website has been launched. The corresponding specification definition is open sourced on this Github repository. The community holds an online discussion every two weeks:

    You’re welcome to join the official community for discussion. The Database Mesh community welcomes enthusiasts from from all over the world to build the ecosystem together.

    SphereEx, a company founded by Zhang Liang (who is also the initiator of Database Mesh), will launch Pisanix next month, which is an open source solution oriented database mesh.

    Authors

    Miao Liyao

    Github: @mlycore

    The Head of Cloud R&D at SphereEx, a promoter of open source, specializing in SaaS and Database Mesh

    In 2015, he began to study Kubernetes and was one of the earliest cloud native practitioners in China. In 2016, he established the “Container Era” WeChat blog and contributed over 600 technical articles. He previously was an infrastructure architect, cloud product leader, cloud native R&D engineer at 株式会社ネットスターズ(NETSTARS), Beijing Chuanyang Technology, Ant Financial Services Group, YeePay, etc.

    Zhang Liang

    Github: @terrymanu

    Zhang Liang, the founder & CEO of SphereEx, served as the head of the architecture and database team of many large well-known Internet enterprises. He is enthusiastic about open source and is the founder and PMC chair of Apache ShardingSphere, ElasticJob, and other well-known open source projects.

    He is now a member of the Apache Software Foundation, a Microsoft MVP, Tencent Cloud TVP, and Huawei Cloud MVP and has more than 10 years of experience in the field of architecture and database. He advocates for elegant code, and has made great achievements in distributed database technology and academic research. He has served as a producer and speaker at dozens of major domestic and international industry and technology summits, including ApacheCon, QCon, AWS summit, DTCC, SACC, and DTC. In addition, he has published the book “Future Architecture: From Service to Cloud Native” as well as the paper “Apache ShardingSphere: A Holistic and Pluggable Platform for Data Sharding” published at this year’s ICDE, a top conference in the database field.
item.author: apache_shardingsphere

item.title: 我的第一个 Python 迷你项目 | My first Python mini project
item.description:
作为我尝试学习 Python 的一部分，我开始了一个小型编码项目，在那里我编写了一个简单的基于文本的计算机游戏，你可以在命令行中运行。 游戏被称为The Tower of Py ，游戏的目的是通过塔楼战斗并击败顶部的邪恶老板。

游戏如何运作：

在游戏中，您可以在三个职业（战士、巫师和圣骑士）之间进行选择，这些职业具有不同的统计数据和可用于战斗的法术。 战斗循环非常简单； 您可以攻击或施法（如果您有足够的法力值），敌人将有机会攻击您。 法术总是命中，而普通攻击有失手的机会，如果你的对手比你强，这会增加。 敌人和法术有不同的“伤害类型”（如自然、火焰、物理等），这些类型会影响造成的伤害量。 例如，火焰伤害对水敌效果较差。 每击败三个敌人，玩家等级就会提高，从而进一步提高他们的统计数据。

统计清单：

  • 力量：决定常规攻击的伤害以及这些攻击击中对手的可能性。
  • 生命值（HP）：当你受到伤害时减少，当所有这些都耗尽时......你死了。
  • 法力点（MP）：用于施法。 更高等级的法术消耗更多的 MP。
  • 砂砾：决定HP的再生速度。
  • 魔法：决定了恢复MP的速度。
  • 分数：每击败一个敌人，每次升级都会增加分数。

您需要下载 classes.py、functions.py、materials.py 和 run.py 文件来运行游戏。 要开始播放，请运行 run.py 脚本。

代码本身：

该程序的核心是三个类：Hero、Spell 和 Enemy。 有一些函数可以根据输入、列表或字典创建英雄、敌人和法术对象。

战斗循环是一个很大的功能，它还使用计算伤害功能和攻击功能（确定对手是否被击中）。 最后是三个阶段功能，可以启动战斗，提供游戏的风味文本，并升级英雄。

随意尝试一下游戏！ 我建议从圣骑士开始，因为它结合了强大的攻击和有限的法术选择。

但请注意……攀登Py之塔具有挑战性……



原文:

As a part of me trying to learn Python I embarked on a small coding project, where I programmed a simple text-based computer game you can run in the command line. The game is called The Tower of Py, where the aim of the game is to fight your way through the tower and defeat the evil bosses at the top.

How the game works:

In the game you can choose between three classes (Fighter, Wizard, and Paladin) which have different stats and spells available to use in combat. The combat loop is pretty simple; you can either attack or cast a spell (if you have sufficient Mana Points) and the enemy will have a chance to hit you with an attack. Spells always hit, while regular attacks have chance of missing which increases if your opponent is stronger than you. Enemies and spells have different ‘damage types’ (like nature, fire, physical, etc.), and these types affect how much damage is dealt. Fire damage, for example is less effective against a water Enemy. For every three enemies defeated the player levels up which further improves their stats.

Stat list:

  • Strength: dictates damage of regular attacks and how likely these attacks are to hit your opponent.
  • Hit Points (HP): decreases when you take damage, and when all these are depleted ... you die.
  • Mana Points (MP): are expended to cast spells. Higher level spells cost more MP.
  • Grit: determines the rate of regeneration of HP.
  • Magic: determines the rate of regenerating MP.
  • Score: increases for each enemy you defeat and for each time you level up.

You need to download the classes.py, functions.py, materials.py, and run.py files to run the game. To start playing run the run.py script.

https://github.com/JHSletten/Tower_of_P[](url)y

The code itself:

The core of the program is three classes: Hero, Spell, and Enemy. The Hero class determines the ‘player class’ (i.e. Wizard), all the related stats, and has functions to: increase or decrease HP and MP, increase stats (level up), return base damage, etc. The Spell class allows Spell objects to have different types, mana costs, damage values, etc.. The Enemy class is similar to the Hero class, in that it defines object with HP and damage values with the associated functions. The Enemy class also has a type and level attribute.
There are functions that creates the hero, enemy, and spell objects based on input, lists, or dictionaries.

The combat loop is one big function that also uses a calculate damage function and an attack function (determines if opponent is hit). Lastly there are three stage functions which initiates combats, provides the flavor text of the game, and levels up the hero.

Feel free to give the game a try! I recommend starting out with a Paladin because it combines strong attacks with a limited spell selection.

Do be warned though... it is challenging to climb the tower of Py...
item.author: johanneshsletten

item.title: 在芽庄玩什么？ | What to Play in Nha Trang?
item.description:
来到芽庄，你会先在芽庄玩什么？ 这是一个旅游胜地，不仅以其美丽的海滩、丰富的美食而闻名，而且芽庄也有许多“非常有趣”的地方。 本文将帮助您选择在芽庄旅游天堂中不容忽视的有吸引力的目的地。 快点把包放回去！

在 Vinpearl Nha Trang 玩什么

问任何人关于在芽庄玩的事，不可能不提到珍珠岛。 这是一个旅游区，近年来吸引了许多游客。 它也被称为 Hon Ngoc Viet ，是芽庄著名的娱乐场所之一。

因此，您无需担心旅行期间在芽庄做什么。 因为Vinpearl Land遍布全国所有省市，但每个地方都有自己的有趣之处，芽庄也是如此。

那么为什么不来试试呢！ 方便玩一辈子，有无数惊险的游戏，逛动物园等，累了就去豪华酒店休息。 还有什么是平等的！

怎么去珍珠岛？

要到达Vinpearl Nha Trang ，您必须从芽庄市中心乘独木舟或缆车前往，移动约 10 分钟。 预定每天上午 8:00 至晚上 10:00 运行。

介绍Vinpearl Land的一些最受欢迎的区域，例如：水上乐园，水族馆，室内外娱乐区，水上音乐舞台，购物街，餐厅区，...

门票费用（包括缆车费和参与游戏）为 350,000 VND/儿童（从 1m 至 1.4m）和 600,000 VND/成人。 仅在海中参观、休息和游泳至少 1 天。

临海游乐园

如果您仍然想知道在芽庄玩什么，Sealife 将是一次有趣的体验。 距芽庄市中心约 20 公里，周围环绕着细白沙滩和清澈湛蓝的大海。 当您来到这里时，您会惊讶于其高达 5000 平方米的巨大面积。

虽然只是一大片未受破坏的土地，但正是保存完好的自然美景吸引了众多游客前来参观。 这里的一个特别的吸引力可能是迄今为止越南最大的浮动公园的模型。

在 Sealife Nha Trang 度假村享受 3 次精彩体验。 那就是在海底驾驶汽车，降落伞和Sealife浮动公园。 在炎热的日子里，这个地方需要在您的芽庄之旅中！

芽庄猴岛

如果你不知道在芽庄玩什么，你应该去一次猴岛。 这个旅游区并非巧合地被大家命名为猴岛。 因为这里是保存1200多只野生猴子的地方。

猴岛位于芽庄市中心以北15公里处，形成于芽富湾寮岛。

如果你想去猴岛，你必须从芽庄市中心沿着Tran Phu街往北走，接近Thap Ba后，再掉头上旧国道1，上新国道1A . 如果您来到 Luong Son 区，您将很容易看到 Nha Phu 湾。 您可以乘坐出租车、骑摩托车或乘坐 06 路公交车前往猴岛。

成人票价为 180,000 越南盾，儿童（<1 立方米）为 90,000 越南盾。

揭示猴岛上有趣的活动。 与猴子玩耍、观看猴子马戏团、享用新鲜海鲜和其他令人兴奋的活动时，您将放松身心。

宁凡湾

宁凡湾是庆和省 4 个最美丽的海湾之一。 宁凡湾离市中心很近，向北只有70公里。 是一个有自己的美丽和吸引力的半岛，属于宁和公社。

这个地方有野性的美丽，但同样浪漫。 因此，游客来到这里享受宁静和诗意的空间。 根据旅游经验，夏天是来宁凡湾最美的季节。

因为距离不远，交通工具也很简单。 您可以乘汽车、摩托车或快艇前往。 来到宁凡湾，您将参加极具吸引力的户外休闲活动。

其中一些是游泳活动，在海滩露营和 Sup 划桨到大海。

迭山岛芽庄

如果你想尝试一种新的感觉， tour dao diep son将是正确的地方。 这被认为是极具吸引力的旅行之一。

也位于庆和省万家镇万峰湾。 位于海中央的近700m的步行道吸引了众多游客来到这个度假胜地。

因此，理想的游览时间是 12 月至 6 月左右。 因为此时，气候干燥，少雨且温暖。 您可以参加更适合这种气候的有趣体验。

根据预算，您应该选择合适的交通工具。 为方便起见，您可以乘坐火车、飞机或巴士前往。 叠山岛提供许多休闲活动，例如：体验海中的漫长道路、皮划艇、探索周围的岛屿和这里的人们的生活。

芽庄阳湾瀑布

如果你想在芽庄玩什么，千万不要错过杨湾瀑布！

因为这是一个充满大自然野性之美的地方。 在当地语言中，阳湾瀑布被翻译为“天上瀑布”。

阳湾是该地区3个瀑布中的主要瀑布。

除了山林飞瀑的原生态，杨湾瀑布还以多种独特的旅游类型和生态旅游而著称。

来到芽庄阳湾，你可以体验到许多新颖独特的游戏。 这些可以被称为赛猪，鳄鱼钓鱼，享受传统音乐，......

天窗芽庄

这个地方有 102 个问题来解决在芽庄晚上玩什么的问题。 如果你不确定晚上在芽庄玩什么，你应该参考这个地方。 虽然是Bar，但是风格很新，值得探索。

设施齐全，设有 4 个活动空间、3 个酒吧、DJ 和游泳池。 每周一至周四下午 4:30 至晚上 11:30 开放。 特别是周五至周日的营业时间为下午 4:30 至上午 00:00。

票价为：越南客人150,000 VND，外国人200,000 VND。

即使你是一个挑剔的旅行者，你也无法抗拒芽庄 Skylight 的吸引力。 来到这里时，您不能错过 Skywalk、Skydeck 360º、屋顶海滩俱乐部和灯塔等地方。 尝试在这些地方体验一次！

以上是前往美丽的芽庄市旅行时最美丽的地方列表。 希望以上分享能解答大家在芽庄玩什么的问题。 祝您与朋友和家人有一个愉快的旅行。



原文:

Coming to Nha Trang, what will you play in Nha Trang first? This is a tourist destination not only famous for its beautiful beach, rich cuisine, but Nha Trang also has many "extremely interesting" places. This article will help you select attractive destinations that you cannot ignore in the tourist paradise of Nha Trang. Hurry up and put the bag back!

What to play at Vinpearl Nha Trang

Ask anyone about playing in Nha Trang, it is impossible not to mention Vinpearl Land. This is a tourist area attracting many tourists in recent times. It is also known as Hon Ngoc Viet , one of the famous entertainment places in Nha Trang.

Vinpearl has achieved 5-star standard and is of international class by the combination of sightseeing and entertainment. Vinpearl Land is located on Nha Trang Bay, on Hon Tre Island, so it is known as "the paradise of the tropics".

Therefore, you do not need to worry about what to do in Nha Trang during your trip. Because Vinpearl Land is present in all provinces and cities across the country, but each place will have its own interesting and so is Nha Trang.

So why not come and try! It is convenient to play for a lifetime with countless thrilling games, visit the zoo, etc., when tired, rest at luxury hotels. What else is equal!

How to get to Vinpearl Land?

To get to Vinpearl Nha Trang, you have to travel from Nha Trang city center by canoe or cable car and move about 10 minutes. Scheduled to operate from 8:00 a.m. to 10:00 p.m. daily.

Introducing some of the most popular areas at Vinpearl Land such as: Water park, aquarium, indoor and outdoor entertainment area, water music stage, shopping street, restaurant area,...

Entrance fee at Vinpearl Nha Trang

The cost for entrance tickets (including cable car fees and participation in the game) is 350,000 VND/child (from 1m to 1.4m) and 600,000 VND/adult. Only visit, rest and swim in the sea for a minimum of 1 day.

Sealife amusement park

If you still wonder what to play in Nha Trang, Sealife will be an interesting experience. Sealife Nha Trang resort (Bai Dai) was built in Cam Hai Dong commune, Cam Lam district, Khanh Hoa province.

About 20km from Nha Trang city center and surrounded by fine white sand and clear blue sea. When you come here, you will be surprised with its monumental area up to 5000 square meters.

Although it is only a large unspoiled land, it is the preserved natural beauty that attracts many tourists to visit. A special attraction here is probably the model of the largest floating park until now in Vietnam.

Pocket 3 attractive experiences at Sealife Nha Trang resort. That is driving cars under the sea, parachute and Sealife floating park. On hot days, this place needs to be in your trip to Nha Trang!

Monkey Island Nha Trang

You should visit Monkey Island once if you don't know what to play in Nha Trang . This tourist area is not coincidentally named Monkey Island by everyone. Because this is the place to preserve more than 1200 wild monkeys.

Monkey Island is 15km from the center of Nha Trang to the North, formed on Lao Island, Nha Phu Bay.

If you want to go to Monkey Island, you have to go along Tran Phu Street from the center of Nha Trang city to the North, after approaching Thap Ba, then turn around to the old National Highway 1 and up to the new National Highway 1A. You will easily see Nha Phu Bay if you come to Luong Son District. You can take a taxi, ride a motorbike or get on bus number 06 to go to Monkey Island.

Ticket price for adults is 180,000 VND, for children (<1m3), 90,000 VND.

Reveal interesting activities on Monkey Island. You will be relaxed while playing with monkeys, watching monkey circus, enjoying fresh seafood and other exciting activities.

Ninh Van Bay

Ninh Van Bay is in the Top 4 Most Beautiful Bays in Khanh Hoa . Ninh Van Bay is very close to the center, only 70 kilometers to the North. Is a peninsula with its own beauty and attraction, belonging to Ninh Hoa commune.

This place has wild beauty but no less romantic. Therefore, visitors come here to enjoy the quiet and poetic space. According to travel experience, summer is the most beautiful season when coming to Ninh Van Bay.

Because the distance is not far, the means of transportation is also simple. You can travel by car, motorbike or speedboat to get there. Coming to Ninh Van Bay, you will participate in very attractive outdoor recreational activities.

Some of them are swimming activities, camping at the beach and Sup paddle boarding to the sea.

Diep Son Island Nha Trang

If you want to try a new feeling, tour dao diep son will be the right place. This is considered one of the extremely attractive tours.

Diep Son Island gathers 3 small islands: Hon Duc - Hon Giua - Hon Bip. Also located at Van Phong Bay, Van Gia town, Khanh Hoa province. The attraction of many visitors to this resort is the walking path stretching nearly 700m, located right in the middle of the sea.

Therefore, the ideal time to visit is around December to June. Because at this time, the climate is dry, with little rain and warm. You can take part in a fun experience more favorable to such a climate.

Depending on the budget, you should choose the appropriate means of transportation. You can go by train, plane or bus for convenience. Diep Son Island offers many recreational activities such as: experiencing the long road in the middle of the sea, kayaking, exploring the surrounding islands and the life of the people here.

Yang Bay Waterfall Nha Trang

If you want to play anything in Nha Trang , don't miss Yang Bay Waterfall!

Because this is a place imbued with the wild beauty of nature. In the local language, Yang Bay Waterfall is translated as " heavenly waterfall ".

Yang Bay Nha Trang Waterfall is about 45km from the Center and is located in Khanh Phu Commune, Khanh Vinh District, Khanh Hoa Province. Yang Bay is the main waterfall among 3 waterfalls in this area.

Besides the unspoiled lands of mountains, forests and waterfalls, Yang Bay waterfall is also famous for many unique types of tourism and eco-tourism.

Coming to Yang Bay Nha Trang, you can experience many new and unique games. These can be mentioned as pig racing, crocodile fishing, enjoying traditional music, ...

Skylight Nha Trang

The place has 102 for the question of what to play at night in Nha Trang . Skylight Nha Trang is the largest outdoor Bar Club in Vietnam at this time with the full name Skylight: 360 Skydeck & Rooftop Beach Club .

If you are not sure what to play in Nha Trang at night, you should refer to this place. Although it is a Bar, it has a new style and is worth exploring.

Skylight Nha Trang is located on the 45th floor of Best Western Premier Havana. Fully furnished with 4 event spaces, 3 bars, DJ and swimming pool. Open at 4:30 PM to 11:30 PM from Monday to Thursday every week. Particularly from Friday - Sunday will be open from 4:30 PM to 00:00 AM.

Ticket price is: 150,000 VND for Vietnamese guests and 200,000 VND for foreigners.

Even if you are a fastidious traveler, you can't resist the attraction of Skylight Nha Trang. When coming here, you can't miss places like Skywalk, Skydeck 360º, Rooftop Beach Club and Lighthouse. Try to experience it even once at these locations!

Above is a list of the most beautiful places to pocket when traveling to the beautiful city of Nha Trang. Hopefully the above sharing can answer everyone's question of what to play in Nha Trang . Wish you have an enjoyable trip with friends and family.

item.title: 芽庄旅游小贴士3天2夜全面探索海城 | Nha Trang Travel Tips 3 Days 2 Nights Fully Explore the Sea City
item.description:
海滨城市芽庄被称为越南的度假天堂。 每年这个地方都吸引着成千上万的国内外游客。 掌握完整游览芽庄 3 ngay 2 dem之旅的秘密！

体验搬到芽庄

搬到芽庄

芽庄每年都是越南最具吸引力的旅游目的地之一。 位于美丽的位置，距离岘港和胡志明市两个大城市仅 400 多公里。 因此，前往芽庄的交通也因州而异。

飞机：

您有很多理由考虑这种形式的迁移。 芽庄拥有全方位的国内和国际直航航线。 每天都有航班，航空公司的价格也比较便宜。 最快的旅行时间，只有大约1小时的飞行时间。

火车：

一个非常有趣的经历的选择。 特别是对于来自西贡的乘客，因为芽庄 - 西贡火车已达到 5 星级质量。 坐在火车上将有机会看到沿途的越南美景。

教练：

这意味着无需谈论便利性、易于接触以及成本。 芽庄有很多车库，出行非常方便。 来自北方的游客也可以乘坐南北巴士前往芽庄。

摩托车：

骑摩托旅行真的很有趣，想停哪里就停，一路上留下很多回忆，也有机会走过很多美丽的目的地。 但是，在乘坐这辆车之前，一定要彻底检查车辆，学好路，准备好食物，身体健康，并在路上与许多人相互支持。

在芽庄的交通工具

租摩托车：这是首选。 它是最积极的手段，也是最具成本效益的手段。 数码车的价格大约是50k/车，踏板车只有80k/车。 非常适合小团体、年轻人，这是最经济的选择。

出租车：芽庄是旅游城市，所以出租车服务也相当发达。 乘坐出租车非常舒适和方便，您无需四处寻找路。 这也是每个人，尤其是老年人最容易预订的交通工具。

公共汽车：在芽庄，乘坐公共汽车也很方便，因为有完整的路线环绕城市、金兰或旅游景点。 不过这辆车使用起来不是很舒服，所以很少有游客选择。

一日游：这是很多人选择的一种旅行方式。 从市区到旅游景点的距离也比较远，是一种极其经济便捷的交通工具。

您可能感兴趣：提高芽庄 4 岛游的质量

因为芽庄是一个极其发达的旅游目的地，所以也有民宿、汽车旅馆、酒店、度假村等多种住宿类型。 还有从基本度假村到高端度假村的各种类别。 芽庄的游客一年四季都很规律，所以价格相对稳定，波动不​​大。

芽庄旅游 3 天 2 夜

房价：65 美元

芽庄旅游 3 天 2 夜

芽庄海滨 2 号酒店

芽庄喜来登酒店

选择酒店时的注意事项

在旺季，建议提前预定，这样酒店就可以占到一个位置，因为很容易把房间烧坏。 根据财务状况，选择适合您需求和支付能力的酒店类型。 住Tran Phu路线对游客来说是最方便的，但这里的价格相当高。 选定的酒店必须靠近著名的旅游景点，以方便接送。

参考

芽庄不容错过的顶级独特旅游景点
著名的芽庄美味佳肴

建议芽庄旅游行程3天2夜

第 1 天
明亮的：

在金兰机场或火车站、汽车站接载乘客。 如果有房间，允许客人在酒店登记入住。
午餐：

安顿好行李后，客人在餐厅享用午餐。 然后返回酒店休息，开始激动人心的旅程。
下午：

抵达 Vinpearl Discovery Nha Trang。

乘坐缆车穿越3320m以上的海，到达美丽的珍珠岛。 这是越南最长的跨海缆车。 因此，从海拔60m的高度，游客可以俯瞰整个芽庄湾，欣赏美丽城市的全景。

通过激动人心的游戏获得激动人心的体验。 斜拉秋千、过山车、摩天轮。 这肯定是一个非常有趣的时刻。

沉浸在室内游戏或令人印象深刻的 4D 电影中。 在 Vinpearlland 水族馆参观色彩缤纷的海底世界。 看到近 10,000 只海洋生物在游泳。

体验管滑梯、滑梯、海啸、宇宙黑洞等水上游戏。或者您可以选择在水上乐园在清澈湛蓝的大海中畅游。

享受独特的水下表演。 海豚和海豹非常有趣和引人注目。

特别是平日19：00，游客可以欣赏和欣赏水上音乐节目的表演。

黑暗的：

游客登上缆车离开海湾返回大陆。

然后在餐厅享用晚餐。 结束了漫长的一天，终于回到酒店休息。

此外，游客还可以加入市中心广场地区繁华迷人的夜市。 或者沿着芽庄海岸散步，欣赏风景。

第 2 天
明亮的：

在酒店享用早餐。 然后准备参加海岛巡游。
游客在考达港下船。

游客可以乘船前往 Hon Mieu。 在这里参观三阮，您可以亲眼看到古老的船只，并发现数百种海洋生物。

离开 Hon Mieu，船将游客带到 Hon Mot。 欣赏芽庄湾的美丽美景，观看一望无际的蓝色海水。

来到 Hon Mot，您可以游泳沉浸在清澈湛蓝的海水中，欣赏这里的珊瑚动物群。
此外，您还可以参加惊险刺激的游戏，如：水肺潜水探索海洋、水上摩托、降落伞飞行......

继续前往渔村。 在这里，您的午餐可以选择充满海味的生海鲜菜肴。

船将带您前往 Bai Tranh 旅游区。 带上雨伞，在海上享受凉爽的微风，自由地游泳。

回到船上。 船带你回到港口。 回酒店休息。 第 3 天

明亮的：

客人在出发前享用早餐。
参观波纳加塔。 这是留下的古老占婆塔之一，位于芽庄的蔡河旁边。 一起欣赏占族的舞蹈，了解占族的传统制陶、编织工艺。

之后前往塔巴温泉度假村。 这里的一个特色是使用“温泉水疗”。 在矿物泥中放松浸泡约 20 分钟。 然后改用水射流按摩穴位，让身体在 10 分钟内感到疲倦，然后继续在游泳池和瀑布的热矿泉浴服务中放松身心。
午餐：

与芽庄特色午餐共进午餐。

来芽庄燕窝，了解芽庄特产，了解燕窝开采加工行业。

参观海洋研究所。 在这里了解咸水和淡水水生物种。 这是越南最早的科研设施，被认为是东南亚最大的海洋研究和文物储存设施。

搬到 XQ 历史店芽庄。 学习越南的传统工艺之一，即手工刺绣。 看着精心制作、一丝不苟的刺绣，是一个完美的组合。

在芽庄游泳

黑暗的：

在餐厅享用晚餐。 回酒店休息 前往芽庄3天2夜的注意事项

芽庄一年四季都可以来，但最合适的时间还是每年的一月到八月。 夏季天气温和、凉爽、通风，适合放松身心。 早上 9 点前抵达芽庄，可在一日游时节省时间和酒店费用。

虽然芽庄的天气相当温和温和，但旺季非常炎热。 因此，防晒霜、帽子和长袖衬衫是很有必要的。

不建议去自给自足的海岛游，因为租独木舟的费用相当高，而且没有导游。

建议最后一天去内城的景点。 因为在中午，你从酒店退房，坐汽车/火车或飞机返回，所以你应该避免迟到。

以上是3天2夜前往芽庄的体验。 希望能给您带来有用的信息，让您的旅行有一个很好的体验。

卢克哈罗德迈尔斯 - Jun 1 6月1日



原文:

The coastal city of Nha Trang is known as a resort paradise in Vietnam. Every year this place attracts thousands of domestic and foreign tourists. Pocket the secret to have a complete trip to tour Nha Trang 3 ngay 2 dem!

Experience moving to Nha Trang

Moving to Nha Trang

Nha Trang is one of the most attractive tourist destinations in Vietnam every year. Located in a beautiful location, just over 400km from 2 big cities, Da Nang and Ho Chi Minh City. Therefore, the traffic to move to Nha Trang is also diversified by the state.

Plane:

There are many reasons for you to consider this form of migration. Nha Trang has a full range of direct domestic and international flight routes. There are flights every day and the prices of airlines are also relatively cheap. The fastest travel time, only about 1 hour flight.

Train:

A choice with quite interesting experience. Especially for passengers from Saigon because Nha Trang - Saigon train has achieved 5-star quality. Sitting on the train will have the opportunity to see the beautiful scenery of Vietnam along the way.

Coach:

This means does not need to talk about convenience, ease of contact as well as cost. There are many garages from Nha Trang, making traveling extremely convenient. Visitors from the North can also take the North-South bus to go to Nha Trang.

Motorcycle:

Traveling by motorbike is really interesting, you can stop wherever you want, save many memories along the way, and also have the opportunity to go through many beautiful destinations. However, before traveling by this vehicle, you must check the vehicle thoroughly, learn the way, prepare food, good health and go with many people to support each other on the road.

Means of transportation in Nha Trang

Rent a motorbike: This is the first choice. It is the most active means and also the most cost-effective means. The price of the digital car is about 50k/car, the scooter is only 80k/car. Extremely suitable for small groups, young people, this is the most economical option.

Taxi: Nha Trang is a tourist city, so taxi services are also quite developed. Traveling by taxi is quite comfortable and convenient, you do not have to find your way around. This is also the easiest vehicle to book for everyone, especially the elderly.

Bus: In Nha Trang, taking a bus is also quite convenient, because there are full routes around the city, Cam Ranh, or tourist attractions. However, the use of this vehicle is not very comfortable, so very few tourists choose.

Day tour: This is a form of travel chosen by many people. The distance from the city to tourist attractions is also quite far, so this is an extremely economical and convenient means of transport.

YOU MAY INTEREST:Improve the quality of 4 island tours in Nha Trang

Where to stay when traveling to Nha Trang 3 days 2 nights?
Because Nha Trang is an extremely developed tourist destination, it also has a variety of accommodation types such as homestays, motels, hotels, and resorts. And also diverse categories from basic to high-end resorts. Visitors to Nha Trang are quite regular throughout the year, so prices are relatively stable and do not fluctuate much.

Apus Hotel Nha Trang Address: 95/9, Hung Vuong Street, Loc Tho, Nha Trang Standard: 3 stars Room rate: from $92

Nha Trang Travel 3 Days 2 Nights

Apus Hotel Nha Trang New Sun Hotel Nha Trang Address: 2A/4 Hung Vuong, Loc Tho, Nha Trang Standard: 3 stars

Room rate: $65

New Sun Hotel Nha Trang Seaside Hotel 2 Address: 60 Tran Phu, Nha Trang City, Khanh Hoa Standard: 4 stars Room rate: $40

Nha Trang Travel 3 Days 2 Nights

Seaside Hotel 2 Nha Trang

InterContinental Nha Trang Address: 32-34 Tran Phu, Loc Tho, Nha Trang Standard: 5 stars Room rate: from $165 Nha Trang Travel 3 Days 2 Nights InterContinental Nha Trang The Costa Nha Trang Residences Address: 32 – 34 Tran Phu, Loc Tho, Nha Trang Standard: 5 stars Room rate: from $100 Nha Trang Travel 3 Days 2 Nights The Costa Nha Trang Residences Sheraton Nha Trang Address: 26-28 Tran Phu, Loc Tho, Nha Trang City, Khanh Hoa Standard: 5 stars Room rate: $200 Nha Trang Travel 3 Days 2 Nights

Sheraton Nha Trang

Notes when choosing a hotel

In the peak months, it is advisable to book in advance so that the hotel can hold a place because it is very easy to burn out rooms. Depending on the financial, to choose the type of hotel that suits your needs and ability to pay. Staying on Tran Phu route is the most convenient for tourists, but the price here is quite high. Selected hotels must be close to famous tourist attractions to facilitate pick-up tours.

REFER

Top unique tourist attractions in Nha Trang not to be missed
Famous Nha Trang delicious dishes

Suggested Nha Trang travel itinerary 3 days 2 nights

Day 1
Bright:

Pick up passengers at Cam Ranh airport or at train station, bus station. Allow guests to check-in at the hotel if a room is available.
Lunch:

After settling luggage, guests have lunch at the restaurant. Then return to the hotel to rest before embarking on an exciting journey.
Afternoon:

Arrive at Vinpearl Discovery Nha Trang.

Take the cable car over 3320m across the sea to the beautiful Pearl Island. This is the longest sea-crossing cable car in Vietnam. Therefore, from a height of 60m above sea level, visitors can admire the whole Nha Trang Bay, enjoy the panoramic view of the beautiful city.

Have exciting experiences with thrilling games. Cable-stayed swing, roller coaster, ferris wheel. It will be a very interesting moment for sure.

Immerse yourself in indoor games or impressive 4D movies. Visit the colorful underwater world at the Aquarium at Vinpearlland. See nearly 10,000 sea creatures swimming.

Experience water games such as tube slide, slide, tsunami, cosmic black hole, etc. Or you can choose to take a dip in the clear blue sea at the water park.

Enjoy a unique underwater performance. Of dolphins and seals that are extremely fun and eye-catching.

Especially at 19:00 on weekdays, visitors can enjoy and admire the performance of the water music program.

Dark:

Visitors board the cable car to leave the bay and return to the mainland.

Then enjoy dinner at the restaurant. Finally, back to the hotel to rest after a long day.

In addition, visitors can join the bustling and attractive night market in the downtown Square area. Or take a walk along the coast of Nha Trang to admire the scenery.

Day 2
Bright:

Have breakfast at Hotel. Then prepare to join the island cruise.
Tourists disembark at Cau Da port.

Visitors are allowed to board a boat to Hon Mieu. Here to visit Tri Nguyen, you can see with your own eyes ancient ships and discover hundreds of types of sea creatures.

Leaving Hon Mieu, the boat takes visitors to Hon Mot. Enjoy the beautiful beauty of Nha Trang Bay, watching the endless blue water.

Coming to Hon Mot, you can swim to immerse yourself in the clear blue water and admire the coral fauna here.
In addition, you can participate in thrilling games such as: scuba diving to explore the ocean, water motor, parachute flying, ....

Continue to Fishing Village. Here you can choose for your lunch raw seafood dishes full of sea flavor.

The boat takes you to Bai Tranh tourist area. Get umbrellas to enjoy the cool breeze at the sea and swim freely.

Back to the ship. The ship takes you back to the port. Back to the hotel to rest. Day 3

Bright:

Guests have breakfast before starting their departure.
Visit Ponagar Tower. This is one of the ancient Cham towers left, located next to the Cai River in Nha Trang. Enjoy the dances of the Cham people together, learn about the traditional craft of pottery making and weaving of the Cham people.

Then move to Thap Ba hot spring resort. A special feature here is the use of "Wenquan hydrotherapy". Take a relaxing soak in the mineral mud for about 20 minutes. Then switch to therapeutic massage with water jets shot at acupuncture points to make the body tired within 10 minutes, continue to relax with hot mineral bath services in swimming pools and waterfalls.
Lunch:

Have lunch with Nha Trang specialties.

Come to Nha Trang's Nest, learn about Nha Trang specialties as well as learn about the industry of exploiting and processing bird's nests.

Visit Institute of Oceanography. Learn about saltwater and freshwater aquatic species here. This is the earliest scientific research facility in Vietnam and is considered the largest marine research and artifact storage facility in Southeast Asia.

Move to XQ history shop Nha Trang. Learn one of Vietnam's traditional crafts, which is hand embroidery. Looking at the elaborate, meticulous embroideries, is a perfect combination.

Swimming in Nha Trang

Dark:

Have dinner at the restaurant. Back to the hotel to rest Notes when traveling to Nha Trang 3 days 2 nights

Nha Trang can come in all seasons of the year, but the most suitable time is still from January to August every year. In the summer months, the weather is mild, cool and airy, suitable for relaxation. Arrive in Nha Trang before 9am to save time as well as hotel costs when taking a day tour.

Although the weather in Nha Trang is quite mild and temperate, the peak season is very hot. Therefore, it is necessary to wear sunscreen, hats and long-sleeved shirts.

It is not recommended to go on a self-sufficient island tour because the cost of renting a canoe is quite high, and there is no tour guide.

It is recommended to go to the attractions in the inner city on the last day. Because at noon, you check out of the hotel, get on the car/train or plane to return, so you should avoid being late.

Above are the experiences when traveling to Nha Trang 3 days 2 nights . Hope to have brought you useful information to have a great experience on your trip.

Luke Harold Miles - Jun 1

item.title: 发布 MineTrax 1.0.0-alpha！ | Releasing MineTrax 1.0.0-alpha!
item.description:
新工艺

发表于终于在我的爱好项目上工作了 1 年和拖延了 6 个月后，我终于发布了它。

在这里查看： https ://minetrax.github.io

它不完整！ 我想做很多功能和改进，但目前我正处于耗尽阶段，可能反馈可能会有所帮助。

什么是 MineTrax？

使用它，您可以通过为玩家提供一个统一的仪表板来访问和查看他们的玩家数据来提高您的服务器参与度，或者您可以将所有内容保密并仅将其用于分析，选择权在您手中。

Zoltán Szőgyényi - Zoltán Szőgyényi - Apr 29 4月29日



原文:

Xinecraft

Posted on Jun 2

Finally after 1 year of work and 6 months of procrastination on my hobby project I am finally releasing it.

Check out here: https://minetrax.github.io

It is not complete! There are lot of features and improvements I want to do but currently I am in the drained out phase and probably feedbacks might help in it.

What is MineTrax?

MineTrax is a web suite & analytics tool for your minecraft servers. Using it you can improve your server engagement by providing a unified dashboard for players to visit and view their player data, or you can keep everything private and use it only for analytics, choice is yours.

Zoltán Szőgyényi - Apr 29
